Name: Plastic Bank
Description:
Plastic Bank is a social fintech with a global bottle deposit program that helps end poverty and stops plastic pollution.

Collection members exchange plastic for money, social benefits, and beyond. Traceable collection, secured income, and verified reporting is delivered through our blockchain-secured platform. 

People and businesses reduce their environmental footprint and support communities through an impact subscription. Subscribers access tools to share impact, invite their customers to join, and grow.

Collected bottles are returned as recycled feedstock to the circular economy. 

Plastic Bank is headquartered in Canada with operations in the Philippines, Indonesia, Brazil, Egypt, Thailand, and Cameroon.

PlasticBank and Social Plastic are trademarks of The Plastic Bank Recycling Corporation.

Learn more at plasticbank.com

Name: Beston Group
Description:
Beston Group is a technology-driven environmental solutions provider specializing in thermal treatment, waste-to-resource conversion, and soil remediation.

With proven expertise in pyrolysis and thermal desorption technologies, Beston delivers integrated solutions for oil sludge treatment, contaminated soil remediation, biomass conversion, and carbon-related applications.

Our focus goes beyond equipment manufacturing - we support clients with engineering design, compliance-oriented solutions, and scalable project execution, helping turn environmental challenges into sustainable resources.

Name: Les Alchimistes
Description:
Chez Les Alchimistes, nous collectons les déchets alimentaires et les transformons en compost pour nourrir les sols !

Nous collectons au quotidien les déchets alimentaires des professionnels (restauration, scolaire, santé, GMS, etc.) et des collectivités. 

Les déchets alimentaires sont compostés sur nos plateformes de compostage, ouvertes et visitables. 

Le compost produit est distribué à des agriculteurs (maraichage, ....), à des jardiniers-particuliers via des enseignes de jardinage et en ligne sur notre site avec le Click&Brouette ou à des professionnels de l'agriculture/végétalisation urbaine. 
 
Nous sommes présents sur 26 territoires en France avec des antennes régionales sur les principales aires urbaines, et nous développons notre réseau sur de nouveaux territoires avec l'objectif d'être présent sur 30 territoires d'ici à 2030. 

À ce titre, nous recrutons régulièrement sur différents métiers. 

Nous pilotons également un projet innovant baptisé Les Couches Fertiles, visant à créer une filière de compostage de couches-bébé compostables, en partenariat avec des fabricants de couches, des réseaux de crèches et des collectivités.

Nous avons plus globalement l'ambition de mobiliser toutes les parties prenantes sur les enjeux des sols. Nous souhaitons mobiliser 7 millions de personnes d'ici à 2030 pour qu'elles connaissent le B.A.BA sur les sols, qu'elles trient leurs déchets alimentaires et qu'elles en parlent autour d'eux. 

- Vous souhaitez un devis pour mettre en place la collecte de vos déchets alimentaires?
- Vous voulez développer la solution Alchimistes sur votre région? 
- Vous voulez vous former sur les sols et mobiliser les gens autour de vous? 
- Vous souhaitez postuler pour l'une de nos offres d'emploi ?
- Vous souhaitez en savoir plus sur les Couches Fertiles? 

→ N'hésitez pas à nous suivre et à nous contacter via notre site internet !

Name: National Waste & Recycling Association
Description: The National Waste & Recycling Association (NWRA) represents the private sector waste and recycling services industry. Association members conduct business in all 50 states and include companies that manage solid, industrial/hazardous, medical, and construction/demolition debris waste, and represent equipment manufacturers and distributors, and a variety of other professional service providers.

Name: Apeiron Bioenergy
Description:
Apeiron Bioenergy is a leading integrated global player in biofuels from waste-based feedstocks to end-products.

Headquartered in Singapore, our presence spans 10 countries, featuring a comprehensive value chain that includes collection and storage, processing facilities, and biofuel refineries.

Name: TchaoMegot
Description: Collecte, recyclage écologique et création de matériaux eco-conçus à partir du mégot de cigarette.

Name: The Kabadiwala
Description:
The Kabadiwala works on the sector of the waste management and organizing the waste sector.
As of now there is no way to track your waste material, we provide you the same.
The Kabadiwala is doorstep service intends to help out busy people to sell their house hold junk like old newspaper and scraps material etc.

Name: LRS
Description: LRS is among the nation's leading independent waste diversion, recycling and portable services providers. Since 2013, LRS has specialized in delivering an exceptional customer experience for millions of residential and commercial customers across seven states: Illinois, Iowa, Indiana, Michigan, Minnesota, Kansas, Arkansas. Diversified and growing, LRS also offers affordable roll-off container services, C&D recycling and portable restroom rentals. LRS owns and operates more than 70 facilities and thrives on the passion of nearly 2,300 full-time employees. LRS has earned numerous accolades for its success, including being named in Crain’s Chicago Business’ Fast 50, NABR’s Best and Brightest lists across the Midwest, and receiving the NWRA Facility of the Year award for its newest MRF, The Exchange. The company provides safe, innovative, sustainability-driven services to clean and beautify the cities, neighborhoods, and communities it serves.

Name: WastePlan
Description:
Pioneering sustainable transformation, WastePlan stands at the forefront of progressive waste management solutions. Focused on diverse industries, we leverage cutting-edge technology and innovative strategies to champion the zero-waste-to-landfill movement. Our services are tailored to the unique needs of our customers, encompassing everything from efficient recycling to responsible waste disposal. Rely on WastePlan to reshape your environmental footprint with unwavering expertise and precision. Let's explore future opportunities in the realm of waste management together.

View more information about WastePlan and its services at www.wasteplan.co.za.

Name: Moulinot Compost & Biogaz
Description:
Moulinot is a Solidarity Company of Social Utility (ESUS) which creates high-quality compost and energy from food waste.
Its founder, Stephan Martinez, was born and raised in the kitchens of Parisian restaurants. Himself a chef, like the previous generations, he found out that:
- in the absence of any sorting and a specific collection, food waste is systematically buried or incinerated
- our soil is so depleted that crops simply cannot grow without prior fertilizing

From his observations, he extracted a simple principle that laid the basis for Moulinot: "That which comes from the earth must return to the earth." In 2007, he became a master composter and the first chef to use earthworms to transform his food waste. He then inspired many others to follow his steps.

Moulinot Compost & Biogaz was launched in 2013. The tailor-made ESS solution enables all sectors of the catering industry to comply with the law, which requires them to transform their food waste. This solution fits perfectly into the circular economy and plays a major role in Sustainable Development thanks to its 3 parts:
- Support and implementation of a customized sorting solution
- Collection of bio-waste by environmentally friendly and innovative vehicles
- Transformation of this food waste into compost and energy.

In 2017, the transformation of the 6 000 tons of collected food waste produced 350 000 m3 of biogas and 5 500 tons of fertilizer. Moulinot Compost & Biogaz, currently employing 22 persons, wants to scale up by 2020. The goals are to:
- employ 50 people in order to collect 50 000 tons of food waste
- develop career pathways
- and spread the model to other regions.

Name: RetuRO SGR
Description:
RetuRO Sistem Garanție Returnare S.A., administratorul Sistemului de Garanție-Returnare din România, a fost creat de un consorțiu de trei acționari privați: Asociația Berarii României pentru Mediu, Asociația Producătorilor de Băuturi Răcoritoare pentru Sustenabilitate și Asociația Retailerilor pentru Mediu și un acționar public, statul român, prin Ministerul Mediului, Apelor și Pădurilor. 

Misiunea RetuRO este de a implementa cel mai mare proiect de economie circulară din România - Sistemul de Garanție-Returnare - și de a contribui la atingerea țintelor de colectare și reciclare asumate la nivel european. Ne dorim să creăm o țară în care fiecare locuitor se simte responsabil de mediul său și vrea să-l păstreze curat. Credem că RetuRO SGR inspiră dorința de schimbare pozitivă, deschizând drumul și oferind cea mai bună soluție pentru eficientizarea colectării și reciclării. Motivăm românii de astăzi să acționeze, pentru ca generațiile de mâine să se bucure de o țară mai curată, mai verde și mai prosperă. 

RetuRO a dezvoltat o infrastructură cuprinzătoare pentru a susține eforturile de reciclare din România, integrând tehnologia, planificarea și implementarea infrastructurii de procesare. RetuRO operează în prezent 7 centre de numărare și sortare a ambalajelor SGR colectate, poziționate strategic la nivel național.

Încă din primul an de funcționare, Sistemul de Garanție-Returnare și-a demonstrat eficacitatea, contribuind la promovarea practicilor sustenabile și la consolidarea economiei circulare în România, prin gestionarea responsabilă a deșeurilor de ambalaje pentru băuturi, în vederea reciclării și reintegrării în circuitul economic. Totodată, RetuRO asigură transparența și trasabilitatea materialelor colectate.

Name: Haulla
Description: We are committed to providing businesses with innovative & cost-effective waste management solutions throughout the US.

Name: GLE Scrap Metal
Description:
Great Lakes Electronics Corp., founded by Nathan Zack in 2000, began its humble operations in a garage where old computers were torn down and recycled. Since that time, the company has grown across the U.S. with multiple locations and hundreds of employees.

In 2004, the Zack family decided to diversify into the ferrous and nonferrous recycling industry, and GLE Scrap Metal (GLE) was born.

As a full-service, all-in-one recycling company with operations throughout the U.S., GLE currently recycles over 250 million pounds of scrap metal each year, and is focused on increasing recyclable tonnage in the years ahead.

GLE employs a top-notch logistics team that handles its expansive fleet of trucks as well as equipment for jobs of any size, at any facility.

The hard-working, dedicated GLE staff takes great pride in honest, upfront service. We strive to build long-term relationships while providing safe, environmentally friendly services. We’re proud of the fact that our customers are treated with respect, and we offer top dollar for their scrap, whether it weighs one pound or one million pounds. GLE’s mission is to safely and efficiently consume and produce a high quality product while always being environmentally responsible. We thank our customers and employees for helping this mission drive our success. Together we’ve made GLE Scrap Metal one of the leading recyclers in the industry.

Name: Just Clear
Description:
At Just Clear, we believe clearance is about more than simply removing items, it’s about creating value, delivering peace of mind, and doing right by our clients, our communities, and our planet. Built on a foundation of integrity, innovation, and sustainability, Just Clear has grown into the largest and most trusted clearance specialist in the UK.

Our mission is bold but simple: to achieve Net Zero through carbon-efficient operations, pioneering recycling solutions, and eco-conscious practices that redefine what clearance can and should be.

We are proud to say that Just Clear is no longer “just” a clearance company. We are a movement, reshaping how society thinks about waste, responsibility, and sustainability and ensuring every clearance we deliver creates a positive impact.

Recognition in the Media & Beyond
Our pioneering approach has not gone unnoticed. Just Clear has been featured in The Guardian, The Sunday Times, and Forbes, each highlighting our unique role as a leader in the sustainability and clearance industries. These features have helped shine a light on how clearance, a sector often overlooked, can in fact become a force for good when approached with creativity and responsibility.

One of the proudest moments in our journey was receiving personal commendation from Sir David Attenborough, whose words of support affirmed the importance of our mission. To be recognised by such a respected voice in the fight for our planet is both humbling and motivating, reinforcing our commitment to continue leading the way.

A Nationwide Network of Trusted Franchise Partners
Just Clear’s strength lies not only in our national infrastructure but also in our people. We operate through a network of locally owned and operated franchise partners, each one a trusted member of their community.

Name: Bekia inc
Description: "Bekia is a waste management and recycling solution for individuals and businesses that makes recycling everyday waste financially rewarding while creating a positive impact on the planet "

Name: Ostreya
Description:
Follow and simplify the management of your waste with Greenwishes!

Greenwishes is an innovative start-up, which offers companies a complete service of sorting, collection and recycling of all waste, while accompanying them in a sustainable manner in their optimization process.

Founded in 2009, Greenwishes develops its service around a central value: customer satisfaction.

Providing answers to each customers problem on recycling and management of waste by focusing on the end customer (employees and visitors), source of waste in business: that's the job of Greenwishes!

Name: ELISE
Description:
AU BUREAU AUSSI, RECYCLONS TOUS NOS DECHETS !

Fondée en 1997, ELISE crée des emplois durables pour des personnes en difficulté ou handicapées dans la collecte et le recyclage des papiers et déchets de bureau.
Numéro 1 en France de la valorisation des papiers des corbeilles de bureau, ELISE (Entreprise Locale d'Initiatives au Service de l'Environnement) met en place dans les bureaux le tri, collecte, pèse et sur trie les papiers pour optimiser les bénéfices du recyclage.
ELISE peut aussi enlever, pour les recycler, d'autres déchets de bureau : cartouches d'encre, piles, bouteilles et gobelets carton, canettes de boisson, lampes, tubes néon, déchets d'équipement électrique et électronique (DEEE), biodéchets, lampes et ampoules, verre, mobilier de bureau 
ELISE assure la sensibilisation en interne et rend compte des poids collectés et des bénéfices engendrés.
ELISE peut aussi effectuer les désarchivages et la destruction confidentielle.

Des Economies pour les Entreprises
La réduction des déchets est une source d'économie qui assure le financement de la collecte effectuée par ELISE. De plus les Entreprises Adaptées du réseau ELISE permettent à leurs clients de réduire leur Taxe AGEFIPH.
ELISE collectera dans plus de 16 entreprises ou établissements publics, grâce à ses 46 Entreprises Locales d'Initiatives au Service de l'Environnement de Paris, Lille, Douai, Amiens, Rouen, Caen, Morlaix, Ploemeur, Compiègne, Bourges, Orléans, Châteauroux, Tours, Nantes, La Rochelle, Limoges, Cognac, Poitiers, Bordeaux, Bayonne, Toulouse, Perpignan, Nîmes, Avignon, Marseille, Nice, Valence, Saint Etienne, Lyon, Grenoble, Annecy, Bourg-en-Bresse, Strasbourg, Dijon, etc...

20.000 tonnes de papier, permettant d'économiser :
100 millions de KWH, 460 000 m3 d'eau et d'éviter le rejet de 6 000 tonnes de CO2
Des emplois solidaires.
620 personnes ont un emploi chez ELISE, parmi lesquelles 70% de personnes issues de l'insertion ou handicapées.

Plus d'informations sur  www.elise.com.fr

Name: Candam Tech
Description:
Candam Technologies has been developing and refining RecySmart since 2017—a cutting-edge recycling technology that identifies WHO recycles WHAT, WHEN, and WHERE in real time, while rewarding users for their efforts.

RecySmart Ring transforms ordinary bins into intelligent recycling stations, enabling cities to recycle smarter.
RecySmart Bin is our all-in-one solution for businesses to track, reward, and optimize waste management.

Our patented technology leverages acoustic algorithms and Artificial Intelligence to detect all types of materials, rewarding users with redeemable points.

Our ecosystem includes:
 A comprehensive platform to track data and generate statistics.
 An App (or physical card) to connect to the device and earn points.
 A reward management platform to incentivize recycling and analyze consumer behavior.

Our mission is to make smart recycling accessible and available to everyone through a scalable, regulation-compliant, and cost-effective system.

Name: ETM RECYCLING
Description: ETM provide a range of services including skip hire, recycling, waste management, tipping and grab hire from the largest transfer station in the South West. Based in the heart of Bristol with the regions biggest skip hire fleet, we work with domestic and trade clients across the South West

Name: Wert Ambiental
Description:
A Wert Ambiental é especialista em gerenciamento e valorização de resíduos industriais, ajudando empresas a reduzir custos e minimizar impactos ambientais. Aplicamos expertise técnica e econômica para criar projetos personalizados e transformar resíduos em oportunidades.

 Atendemos indústrias com soluções personalizadas e sustentáveis;
 Temos infraestrutura própria para coleta, tratamento e destinação correta;
 Nossa equipe técnica garante total conformidade ambiental.

Transforme seu descarte industrial em lucro para o seu negócio! 

Entre em contato com nossos especialistas e descubra como podemos ajudar sua empresa.

 contato@wertambiental.com.br

Name: Thorntons Recycling
Description:
Thorntons Recycling, founded in 1979 is a privately owned family run Waste Management and Recycling business.  Employing more than 450 staff supplying customer services to over 70,000 Household customers and 5,500 Commercial customers in Dublin, Meath, Kildare and Wicklow.

The company operates a number of EPA licensed facilities and a number of permitted facilities in its main catchment areas. The facilities focus on Recycling and Recovering as much of the material received and reducing the amount of waste sent to landfill. This enables the company to offer its customers a premium value for money service.

Current operations include: 
* Materials Recovery Facility at Killeen Road, Dublin 10 (EPA Licensed 250k tonnes per annum)
* Materials Recovery Facility at Dunboyne, Co Meath (EPA Licensed for 50k tonnes per annum)
* Composting Facility at Kilmainhamwood, Co Meath (EPA Licensed for 40k tonnes per annum)
* Dry Mixed Recyclables Facility at Park West, Dublin 10 (Dublin City Council permit for 50,000 tonnes per annum
*  Secure Confidential Shredding Facility at Parkwest, Dublin 10

The company holds ISO Certification for its Quality Management Systems (ISO 9001), Environmental Management Systems (ISO 14001), new Occupational Health and Safety Management System standard (ISO45001:2018) and EN15713 accreditation for its Confidential Shredding facility.

Name: Plastic Expert
Description:
We help businesses recycle bulk volumes of plastic waste to deliver both cost and environmental savings. Through our extensive network of haulage & processing partners, Plastic Expert operates one of the most environmentally friendly recycling services. If you are on the hunt for plastic recycling companies, contact us today!

Our Mission

Plastic Expert’s success year on year over the past 14 years has been largely credited to our devotion in seeing plastic waste primarily diverted from Incineration and secondly diverted from landfill.

As of 2022 the UK has 53 operational waste to energy plants with planning consents for more being granted each year.

Waste Plastic has such a high and reliable calorific rate of burn that it is an extremely popular waste stream to divert into these incinerators for the production of energy.

We have worked with many organisations over the years to divert increasing volumes of domestic and commercial waste plastic from incineration to be re-purposed through highly efficient recycling processes.

Name: Green Phoenix
Description:
Green Phoenix  est une société à mission de l’ESS, spécialisée dans la gestion des biodéchets  pour les professionnels et les collectivités dans le Bas-Rhin.

 Pépite de Pépites France 2023
 World Top 16 Impact start-up 2022 
 Champion national Enactus 2022
 Meilleure collaboration responsable de France 2021 aux Village Awards 

80% des biodéchets sont incinérés en France, alors qu’ils peuvent être valorisés en engrais et en énergie. Épluchures, agrumes, restes de repas, marc de café ou déchets du jardin.

Nos solutions de tri, collecte et valorisation des biodéchets, favorisent la protection de l’environnement, l’économie 
circulaire locale et le contact humain !

La loi AGEC oblige la mise en place d’un tri à la source 
des biodéchets pour tout le monde depuis le 1er janvier 2024.

Nous accompagnons les professionnels et les collectivités dans le diagnostic et la mise en place d’un système de gestion des biodéchets adaptés.

Pour rejoindre la boucle de l'économie circulaire contactez nous :

daniel.perez@greenphoenix.fr

Name: TOMRA Collection Ireland
Description:
TOMRA creates reverse vending solutions for collecting and recycling cans and bottles. We are ready to help retailers in Ireland prepare for the upcoming deposit return scheme.
The TOMRA system has the machines, digital solutions and service to make recycling easy for the industry, system owners, retailers and consumers. With approximately 85,000 installations across more than 60 markets, TOMRA’s reverse vending machines capture over 46 billion used beverage containers every year – reducing reliance on raw materials and ensuring fewer containers end up in landfills, oceans and streets. 

TOMRA Collection is part of the TOMRA Group, which creates sensor-based solutions for optimal resource productivity, and has a vision to lead the Resource Revolution. The Group employs approximately 5,000 people globally and is publicly listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange (OSE: TOM).

Name: Shorts Group Ltd
Description:
Shorts Group are a long established, independent family-owned business offering excellent quality and service in everything from plant hire to agricultural contracting, skip hire, waste management and demolition. 
Headquartered in Bracknell, we provide comprehensive services throughout Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Surrey and the surrounding counties. In fact, as we grow, we are now delivering our products and services throughout the UK.

The high standard of our service is the result of 60 years of experience in serving the various aspects of the construction, agricultural and waste management industries. At Shorts Group we pride ourselves on being prompt, helpful and reliable. Our main focus is always on customer service and satisfaction.

Shorts Group are also members of the Hire Association Europe and have been awarded SAFE CONTRACTOR, ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 accreditations. 

In 2009 we were granted a Royal Warrant to Her Majesty The Queen as Agricultural Contractors.

Name: Kenny Waste Management
Description:
Based on Lester Road in Worsley, Kenny Waste Management is Manchester’s largest independent total waste management business and has specialised in the provision of an environmentally safe and controlled waste management service and skip hire for over 30 years. We support our clients regionally and nationally, ranging from blue chip multinational companies, commercial clients and domestic customers. 

We are also making a conscious effort to make a difference in the communities that we serve. Our social enterprise is helping the long term unemployed, ex-offenders and young people find steady employment. We are grateful that we have been able to make such a positive impact and that so many people have now been employed through the scheme. 

With some of the most comprehensive and efficient waste recovery and recycling plants in the North West, we are enabled to process over 15,000 tonnes of waste each month from a whole cross-section of waste producers. 

Led by our core values ‘recover, divert from landfill, recycle’ we provide bespoke waste management solutions that will keep you fully compliant with all current legislation. We are proud to report that we currently divert 99% of the waste we collect from landfill. We’re determined to become a zero-landfill company and we believe that through our commitment to excellence for our customers, we will make this goal a reality.

Name: Bristol Waste Company
Description:
Bristol Waste Company are responsible for refuse and recycling collection, street cleansing and waste disposal for the people of Bristol. We also run the city’s two Reuse and Recycling Centres (RRCs) plus growing commercial waste and facilities management businesses.

We are an enthusiastic, forward-thinking company with an ambitious vision for Bristol. A key part of this is the clear need to influence behavioural change in the city with regard to waste, recycling and litter, and to involve and empower citizens, community groups and businesses. In doing so, together, we can make Bristol a cleaner and greener place that wastes nothing.

Name: J&B Recycling Ltd
Description: J&B Recycling, an FCC Environment company, has grown since 1998 from a small family managed business into a reputable, well established recycling and waste management company that is recognised nationally. We handle Local Authority and commercial waste from 20 acres of advanced facilities, with 200+ staff and 19 vehicles processing over 200,000 tonnes annually.

Name: Smicval
Description:
Le SMICVAL (Syndicat Mixte Intercommunal de Collecte et de Valorisation) du Libournais et de la Haute-Gironde exerce les compétences de Collecte et Traitement des déchets ménagers et assimilés pour 138 communes et environ 210 000 habitants.
Le territoire couvre environ 2 000 km2 au Nord de la Gironde, comprend 11 communautés de communes et une communauté d’agglomération ainsi que les sous-préfectures de Libourne et Blaye.
Le syndicat compte 249 agents dont 80% sont sur des postes liés à la collecte et à l’accueil en déchèterie, c'est-à-dire sur les routes ou au contact des habitants.
Les élus du Smicval portent une vision ambitieuse et stratégique pour la structure et le territoire. La mission première du Smicval est de rendre un service public de qualité avec la conscience de la responsabilité sociale, environnementale et économique des activités.
Le Smicval est dans une dynamique “Zéro Déchet” par la mise en place de la collecte séparée des biodéchets, d’une politique de recyclage multi filières... La collectivité a passé un cap supplémentaire en renforçant son action sur la prévention et les changements de comportements en y accordant des moyens humains et financiers. Ce basculement dans le "Zéro Déchet" a pour finalité de réduire la quantité de déchets.
Par ailleurs, la structure développe une politique intégrée de développement de l’Economie Circulaire sur son territoire par le programme Nouvel’R.

Name: Ellgia
Description:
Ellgia provide waste management, recycling solutions and skip hire to businesses, the trade and home-owners across East Anglia and the East Midlands in Cambridgeshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Leicestershire, Northamptonshire and Suffolk.

We are working towards “Zero waste to landfill” with investment across our sites to increase waste sorting, production of Solid recovered Fuel (SDF) and Refuse Derived Fuel (RDF) and Biomass Fuel. 

We provide recycling advice, waste audits and waste solutions with a variety of sectors such as the Building Trade, Offices, Hospitality, Agriculture, Retail, Schools, Logistics, Automotive, Defence, Construction, Printing, Manufacturing, Healthcare and Home-Owners. In 2018 we have been recognised for our customer service and innovative thinking in the MRW National Recycling Awards as Independent Operator of the Year.

Name: Cy-Clope
Description:
Créée en 2015, Cy-Clope est une entreprise française spécialisée dans la gestion de zones fumeurs.
Nous proposons un service clé en main qui comprend l’installation de mobilier, la collecte et la valorisation des mégots en circuit court.
Nous accompagnons tous types de structures publiques ou privées dans la mise en place d’une solution sur-mesure.

Name: Ricova
Description: Ricova, a global leader in waste management and recycling, offers comprehensive solutions for the collection, sorting, and recovery of recyclable materials. With a fleet of over 150 trucks and two specialized centers, we efficiently manage materials such as cardboard, mixed paper, plastics, metals, and glass. Offering customized services, including container rentals and commercial waste collection, we help businesses reduce their environmental footprint. Ricova plays a key role in the recovery and commercialization of recyclable materials, while integrating organic waste recovery strategies and striving for Zero Waste.

Name: CANEI
Description:
Since 2012, CANEI has prevented billions of plastic items from ending up in landfills and oceans worldwide.

Our vast recycling knowledge and global reach have allowed us to increase recycling rates in numerous countries.  

As a top supplier of recycled plastic materials, we offer the highest quality rPET, rPE, and rPP products.

 We take quality control seriously, testing each product multiple times to ensure it meets our standards. If it doesn't, the entire batch undergoes a second round of rigorous testing

Our international reach only begins at our home base in Toronto, Canada, and spans many countries. We are in North America, Europe, Africa, and Asia. 

Through collection, quality, and trust, we work to contribute to developing a circular economy.

Name: SPARKLO
Description: Sparklo is an Ecology, Technology, and a Lifestyle company that offers innovative recycling solutions for a better future. With our cutting-edge AI-powered Reverse Vending Machines and unique reward system, we make everyday recycling effortless and enjoyable for people worldwide. At Sparklo, we believe that encouragement and rewards are better motivators than fear and guilt. Join the Sparklo movement towards a more sustainable future today.

Name: MOHU
Description: A MOHU, mint koncessziós társaság évente mintegy 5 millió tonna lakossági és intézményi, vállalati, vegyes és elkülönített hulladék gyűjtésének és kezelésének a megszervezésért felel 2023. július 1-jétől, továbbá feladata az EPR rendszerek és a kötelező visszaváltási rendszer kiépítése és működtetése.

Name: E-Waste Social
Description:
E-Waste Social is a state of art Waste Aggregator associating organizations with waste recyclers. We actively promote eco-friendly reuse and recycling of all waste. As an end-to-end Waste Aggregator, we aim to turn today’s waste into sustainable resources for tomorrow.

A cost-benefit analysis for Corporate using the E-Waste Social auction platform are as follows:
-Up to 50 percent, higher revenue for waste auctioned.
-75 percent reduced cost for disposal of waste. 
-10 percent of space saved every year by efficient removal of waste. 
-Corporates can achieve their  UN SDG thereby promoting a circular economy. 

We look forward to your partnership and providing a sustainable solution for managing your All kinds of Waste materials.

Name: Easy To Compost
Description:
Easy To Compost est la solution pour une gestion clé en main de vos déchets alimentaires, partout en France ! Plus économique et plus écologique que la collecte classique, il s’agit d’une solution de compostage simple à mettre en place pour trier vos biodéchets.

Description:
Les déchets ne se transforment pas seuls. C’est pourquoi nous existons. Nous sommes fiers d'être un acteur de l’économie circulaire et de travailler main dans la main avec les différents acteurs de ce secteur.

Nous visons à transformer les défis environnementaux en opportunités, en sensibilisant notre communauté quant aux bons gestes à adopter, en revalorisant les déchets que nous traitons et en optimisant nos processus grâce à une technologie de pointe. 

Nous sommes fiers de faire partie de la grande famille de Waste Connections Inc, qui sert plus de six millions de clients en Amérique du Nord. 

Rejoignez-nous dans notre quête pour un impact positif sur la planète, une mission que nous poursuivons avec engagement et passion.

With Hector, food waste is no longer a burden — it’s a lever:

- to reduce your carbon footprint

- to engage teams in a meaningful daily action

- to meet legal requirements without the headache

Already active in Paris, Toulouse, Montpellier and expanding to other major cities, we support all kinds of organizations in building a more sustainable waste management model.

Gecco propose également une valorisation de ce déchet en  biolubrifiants pour les chaines de tronçonneuses.

Nous collectons par ailleurs le marc de café et les biodéchets (fermentescibles), et proposons nos services, tels que le nettoyage des bacs dégraisseurs. 

C'est aussi un laboratoire de recherche scientifique qui a pour objectif l'optimisation de l'empreinte écologique de la filière, en appliquant notamment les principes de l'éco-conception par une approche de l'Analyse par le Cycle de Vie (ACV) environnementale et sociale.

Name: Colorado SWANA Rocky Mountain Chapter
Description:
The Colorado Rocky Mountain Chapter of SWANA (Solid Waste Association of North America) is an organization of more than 200 public and private section professionals committed to the advancement of the Solid Waste Management Industry in Colorado and the greater Rocky Mountain region.

In 1979, the founding members and initial organization of the Chapter was accepted into the Colorado Governmental Refuse Collection and Disposal Association and the articles of incorporation were filed with the Colorado Secretary of State on 1983. The name of the organization was changed in 1986 to the “Colorado Rocky Mountain Governmental Refuse Collection and Disposal Association” and changed in 1994 to the current configuration, “Colorado Rocky Mountain Chapter of the Solid Waste Association of North America (SWANA).”

Please see our newsletter here: https://www.coloradoswana.org/newsletters-1

Promovemos y ejecutamos las mejores prácticas en materia de recolección de Aceite de Cocina Usado (ACU) como insumo principal para la elaboración de biodiesel, alternativa más ecológica y amigable con el planeta.

En Ecoil Planet, además de ser especialistas registrados y certificados ante las autoridades ambientales del país para el reciclaje y tratamiento del Aceite de Cocina Usado (ACU), nos convertimos en aliados estratégicos de cadenas de restaurantes e industria alimenticia, para encargarnos de sus residuos de aceite, cumplir la normatividad legal y contribuir conjuntamente a cuidar el medio ambiente.

Con TerraVita ampliamos nuestro modelo de economía circular con compromiso ambiental, a través de la comercialización de aceites refinados de cocina y de materias primas para el sector agroindustrial.

Name: Orange Strategy Waste Value
Description:
Orange Strategy Ltd is a female led waste recycling firm that is leveraging technology as an effective means for collection of recyclable waste from households in Ogun State Nigeria, using our mobile application (WasteValue) and USSD codes. 
We encourage households to sort their waste from source, separating recyclable waste from general waste and earn 'Value Points' in exchange for this. These Value Points can be converted into cash, food items, household items, vouchers and stationery.
We are also addressing poverty by creating a source of income for vulnerable women and women living below poverty line. This is achieved by employing vulnerable women on our work force, we also support women living below poverty line by setting up mini collection hubs for them within their local communities, they gather recyclable waste in large quantity while we buy from them at the prevailing market price per time.
Our target is to empower 50 women in each local government area in Ogun State Nigeria. We have been able to set up this mini collection hubs for 7 women in Abeokuta South LGA and 3 women in Abeokuta North LGA Ogun State, our target is to achieve the setup of 100 mini collection hubs in across the 20 local government areas across Ogun State.
We are sustaining a clean environment and reducing carbon emissions as these recyclable waste serve as raw materials for the production of finished and semi-finished goods, this is a better alternative to sourcing for virgin raw materials, as it prevents greenhouse gas emissions that would result from extracting or mining virgin raw materials.

Dari kegiatan aktivitas Perusahaan, secara garis besar perusahaan kami terbagi dalam 2 (dua) divisi. Divisi yang pertama adalah Divisi Limbah industry non B3 yaitu Divisi yang menangani sampah dan limbah industry non B3. Untuk limbah industry Non B3 perusahaan kami memiliki tempat pemilahan (sorting location) dan tempat penyimpanan di kawasan industri Desa Baru RT. 02 RW. 02. Pemilahan dan penyimpanan dilakukan oleh tenaga kerja terdidik dan berpengalaman dibidangnya. Pemilahan dan Penyimpanan dilakukan berdasarkan jenis limbah industry non b3 yang memiliki niliai jual seperti : Almunium, tembaga, Besi, Kertas Karton serta kayu pallet bekas.
Sedangkan untuk divisi kedua adalah divisi yang khusus menangani pengumpulan Limbah Bahan Berbahaya dan Beracun (LB3). Pengidentifikasian, Pengemasan, Penyimpanan, Trucking dan Pengapalan (pengiriman melalui laut) serta dokumentasi dilakukan oleh tenaga-tenaga terdidik dan berpengalaman dibidangnya. Kami juga melakukan pemanfaatan LB3 menjadi batu bata. Lokasi Tempat penyimpanan sementara limbah B3 serta pabrik batu bata berada di kawasan Industry Jl. Lintas Timur Desa Baru RT. 02 RW. 02 Siak Hulu, Kampar Riau.

Name: SCRAPLINE
Description:
At Scrapline, we bridge the gap between scrap aggregators and recycling plants, facilitating seamless transactions in the buying and selling of all types of scrap materials. Our mission is to create a sustainable and efficient ecosystem where scrap is no longer seen as waste but as a valuable resource that can be transformed into new, usable materials.

We specialize in connecting scrap aggregators with recycling facilities, ensuring that the process is not only profitable for all parties involved but also environmentally responsible. Our platform is designed to streamline the logistics, pricing, and quality control, making the scrap trade more transparent and accessible.

By leveraging technology and industry expertise, Scrapline is committed to driving the circular economy forward, reducing waste, and promoting sustainable practices in the scrap and recycling industry.

Name: ReGain Geri Dönüşüm
Description:
Firmamız, geri dönüşüm alanında uzmanlaşmış bir ekip ile çalışmakta olup, sürdürülebilir çözümler sunarak çevreye ve ekonomiye katkıda bulunmaktadır. Ana hizmetlerimiz şu şekildedir:

Tehlikesiz Atık Yönetimi: Endüstriyel ve ticari faaliyetlerden kaynaklanan tehlikesiz atıkların toplanması, ayrıştırılması ve uygun geri dönüşüm yöntemleriyle değerlendirilmesi.

Hurda Demir ve Metal Geri Dönüşümü: Hurda metal atıklarının toplanması, işlenmesi ve demir-çelik sanayisi gibi sektörlerde tekrar kullanılması için geri dönüşümü sağlanmaktadır.

Kağıt ve Karton Geri Dönüşümü: Kağıt ve karton atıklarının toplanıp geri kazanımı sağlanarak, hem çevreyi koruyor hem de kâğıt üretiminde kullanılan enerji ve su tüketimini azaltıyoruz.

Plastik ve Naylon Geri Dönüşümü: Plastik atıkların ayrıştırılması, geri dönüşüm tesislerinde işlenerek, üretim süreçlerinde ham madde olarak kullanılabilir hale getirilmesi.

Ambalaj Atıkları Yönetimi: Ticari ve endüstriyel faaliyetlerden kaynaklanan ambalaj atıklarının toplanması, ayrıştırılması ve geri dönüştürülmesi.

Ahşap Geri Dönüşümü: Ahşap atıkların geri kazanılması ve mobilya, palet gibi ürünlerde kullanılmak üzere tekrar üretime kazandırılması.

Amacımız, atık yönetiminde çevre dostu ve yenilikçi çözümler sunarak doğal kaynakların korunmasına katkı sağlamak ve geri kazanım oranlarını artırmaktır.

Name: Plustik.id
Description:
When everybody is too busy solving the plastic bottle problems, we focus on the most problematic plastic waste in the most problematic place.

The low value hard to recycle plastic at the landfill. 

Every time we go to any landfills in Indonesia, all of them are full of these materials, as they have no value, almost impossible to collect because it take so long and so many just to get 1 Kg. 

In oder for us to do this on a daily basis, we set up a collection facility inside the landfill to collect and divert up to 5 tons/day of these problematic plastic waste and to make sure all that we divert does not come back and pollute the environment, we turn all of those materials into new non single use products. 

Plustik is a high impact startup reducing up to 5 tons of low value hard to recycle plastic waste direct from the landfill and use all of those materials to create new non single use products.

TreasureBot helps cities, businesses, and people build a clean and true circular future.

Name: Grow It Away
Description:
Grow It Away is a compost community around Amsterdam committed to redirecting food scraps away from incineration/landfill. It’s an awful waste to throw food away in this manner, especially when nature already has the perfect solution. We give nature the space to do what it does best and see our organic leftovers transformed into a healthy biologically thriving compost. Grow It Away offers a monthly subscription to its members for €15 a month, to have their food scraps regularly collected from their doorstep and cycled off to be composted in line with Dr Elaine Ingham’s Soil Food Web principles. Each spring our members receive a bucket of that living compost back, so they can in turn nourish their houseplants or garden greens.

Join the food scrap saving – compost making – soil regeneration generation today!

Name: Pakomak
Description:
Pakomak is a non-profit company, founded on 3.12.2010, whose activity is the management of packaging waste, in accordance with the new Law on the management of packaging and packaging waste.

The founders of the company are 11 leading production companies in Macedonia: Pivara Skopje AD Skopje; Prilepska Pivarnica AD Prilep; Vitaminka AD Prilep; Pelisterka DOO Skopje; Magroni DOO Skopje (Ladna, Dobra Voda); Coding Dooel Kavadarci (Gorska voda); Kozuvchanka DOO Kavadarci; Vivax Ltd. Skopje; Blagoj Gjorev AD Veles; VV Tikvesh AD; VV Stobi AD.
The company's goal is to build a long-term and solid cooperation with its customers and with the state and in accordance with European regulations - to minimize the negative impact of packaging waste on the environment, to promote a responsible attitude of companies towards packaging waste, thus enabling a better quality life for all.

Pakomak is open to the inclusion of all companies that have an obligation to manage their packaging waste and that are aware of their social responsibility for ensuring a healthier environment. Within Pakomak, new member companies have the same treatment as founding companies.
As of May 20, 2011, Pakomak is the 34th national non-profit company to join the international packaging waste management network ProEurope (http://pro-e.org/), thus obtaining the license to use the "Green Dot" symbol. The Green Dot is a financial symbol, which indicates that a fee has been paid for handling the waste after use for the packaging that has this symbol.

Name: CHIMIREC EST
Description:
CHIMIREC EST : Votre partenaire en gestion responsable et valorisation des déchets
 CHIMIREC EST, filiale du GROUPE CHIMIREC, met à profit plus de 60 années d’expertise pour offrir aux entreprises des solutions complètes et innovantes dans la gestion et la valorisation des déchets. Leader reconnu dans le secteur, nous nous engageons à accompagner nos partenaires vers un avenir plus respectueux de l’environnement.
 Des solutions personnalisées et efficaces
Chez CHIMIREC EST, nous comprenons que chaque entreprise est unique. C’est pourquoi nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour élaborer des stratégies sur mesure, adaptées à leurs besoins spécifiques. Notre mission : réduire leur empreinte écologique tout en garantissant une conformité rigoureuse avec les réglementations environnementales en constante évolution.
 Un savoir-faire technique et réglementaire pointu
Notre équipe d’experts, dotée d’une connaissance approfondie des réglementations environnementales et des technologies innovantes, offre des solutions optimales à chaque étape de la gestion des déchets : collecte, tri, traitement, valorisation et élimination. Nous investissons régulièrement dans des technologies de pointe pour garantir des performances toujours plus élevées et respectueuses de l’environnement.
 Un acteur clé de l’économie circulaire
Pionniers dans la promotion de l’économie circulaire, nous nous engageons à transformer les déchets en ressources. Notre objectif est de maximiser le recyclage, encourager la réutilisation et minimiser la mise en décharge. Cette approche nous permet de préserver les ressources naturelles, tout en limitant les impacts environnementaux liés aux activités humaines.
 Des services fiables, sûrs et de haute qualité
La satisfaction de nos clients repose sur notre capacité à respecter les délais, fournir des prestations conformes aux standards les plus exigeants et garantir des opérations sécurisées.

Name: Central West Waste Management (Formally Rural Bin Service)
Description:
Central West Waste Management (formally Rural Bin Service) provide waste management services to residents and businesses throughout the Central West NSW.

We provide residential, commercial and construction services across seven LGA’s throughout Central West NSW. Bathurst, Orange, Cabonne, Cowra, Blayney, Oberon and Lithgow.

Our core objective is to ensure we provide our clients with “A Better Waste Management Solution”.

We achieve this by taking the time to understand our clients individual needs and requirements. This allows us to ensure we are not only providing a professional and reliable service but most importantly the the right services for our clients. 

We have a strong focus on reducing landfill through better waste management practices. We ensure where possible that viable material is recovered from waste for recycling and or beneficial reuse.

We achieve this by providing the following resource recovery services;

* Recycling service to residents and businesses who fall outside of council service areas, diverting over 90 Tonne per year of residential household waste from landfill.

* Concrete, timber, gyprock and metal recycling services for the building and construction industry. This not only reduces our landfill rates but also significantly reduces the associated disposal cost for our clients.

Aside from the importance of providing “A better waste management solution” for our clients we believe exceptional communication is the key to happy clients. Here at CWWM we are commonly commended for our good old fashion communication and dedication to our clients which is something we are extremely proud of. Thank you for taking a look at Central West Waste and we welcome to to reach out for a friendly chat anytime.

Name: Kompania për Menaxhimin e Deponive në Kosovë SH.A
Description:
Në bazë të Ligjit nr. 03/L-087 për Ndërmarrjet Publike, Kompania për Menaxhimin e Deponive në Kosovë (KMDK SH. A.), është kompani e legalizuar dhe e licencuar për menaxhimin e deponive sanitare regjionale të mbeturinave Komunale në Republikën e Kosovës, e korporatizuar dhe e regjistruar si Shoqëri Aksionare konform Ligjit Nr. 02/L-123 për Shoqëritë Tregtare.

Struktura institucionale, roli dhe përgjegjësitë e institucioneve relevante në menaxhimin e DS të mbeturinave në Kosovë janë përcaktuar me legjislacionin që është në fuqi, në bazë të cilit është emëruar Bordi i Drejtorëve nga ana e Qeverisë së Kosovës.

Ministria e Zhvillimit Ekonomik (MZHE) në bazë të Ligjit për Ndërmarrjet Publike (NR. 03/L-087) përmes Njësisë për Politika dhe Monitorim, mbikëqyrë afarizmin e ndërmarrjeve publike të cilat janë në pronësi të Qeverisë së Republikës së Kosovës si dhe përkujdeset për monitorimin dhe transparencën e tyre. Ky ligj themelon kornizën për ushtrimin e të drejtës pronësore në ndërmarrjet publike dhe rregullon qeverisjen e korporatave të këtyre ndërmarrjeve.

Kompania është themeluar nga institucionet vendore dhe ndërkombëtare, donacion i dhëne nga Agjencia Evropiane për Rindërtim dhe Zhvillim (AER). KMDK menaxhon me këto asete konform legjislacionit në fuqi dhe standardeve të e përcaktuara me qellim të ruajtjes së mjedisit dhe rritjes së vlerës së aseteve të kompanisë.

Kompania ofron  shërbimet e veta në këto Deponi regjionale:

Deponia Sanitare e Mirashit -  Prishtinë
Deponia Sanitare e Dumnicës -  Podujevë
Deponia Sanitare e Landovicës - Prizren
Deponia Sanitare e Velekincës  -  Gjilan
Stacionin e  Transferit  në Ferizaj

Name: Otilo Foundation
Description:
Otilo is a pioneering enterprise committed to leading the charge in sustainable PET recycling across Enugu State, Nigeria, and beyond. With a steadfast focus on environmental stewardship, Otilo specializes in establishing an extensive network of collection points and branches strategically positioned across Nsukka and extending to the local government areas of Enugu State. 

Our core mission revolves around revolutionizing the recycling landscape by facilitating increased collection of plastic bottles, thereby significantly reducing environmental pollution while fostering a circular economy.

At Otilo, we recognize the critical importance of localized efforts in addressing the global challenge of plastic waste. Our approach involves establishing a robust infrastructure of collection points and branches that serve as accessible hubs for the community to responsibly dispose of and recycle PET bottles. By seamlessly integrating these collection points into the fabric of Nsukka and the wider Enugu State, we aim to not only incentivize recycling but also create awareness about the pressing need for sustainable waste management practices.

Moreover, our vision extends beyond immediate impact. We aspire to expand our footprint extensively, with plans to establish additional branches not only across Enugu but throughout Nigeria. This expansion aligns with our overarching commitment to scaling up sustainable practices, promoting environmental consciousness, and contributing tangibly to a greener, more sustainable future for our communities and the nation.

Otilo stands at the forefront of the PET recycling movement, driven by a passion for environmental conservation, community engagement, and the relentless pursuit of a cleaner, healthier planet. Join us in our journey toward a circular economy, where recycling isn't just a process but a way of life.

Ne dorim astfel sa contribuim la indeplinirea celui mai ambitios proiect de sustenabilitate din Romania, Sistemul de Garantie-Returnare.

Description:
Sustainability is at the core of what we do!

We are approaching all management firms that intend to use recycled organic waste from large  wholesalers, distributors, and retailers as animal feed.

Reducing food waste by assisting farmers will ease climate change.

SUSTAINABILITY - Taluca Feeds concept of sustainability is composed of three pillars; economic, environmental and social (our planet) (Empowering growth and Support and Employment).
ACCOUNTABILITY- As a company and Taluca Feeds we are accountable to you suppliers, employees and community members.
TRACEABILITY- Taluca Feeds ensures easy track and transportation of waste product 
streams and optimized processes, and monitor social and 
environmental impact in real time.
TRANSPARENCY -From the point of contact with our supplier to the end user our farmers ensure productivity, trust, culture, and morale are among our key factors which embrace transparency.

Food waste is an environmental nuisance. It contributes to global warming and climate change. A massive amount of resources go into producing each ounce of food, of which a huge chunk (approximately one-third))  goes unutilised. There was a deficit of efficient ways to deal with the waste of this magnitude in the country. 

Get in touch with Taluca Animal Feeds to know more about thier mission of turning food waste into animal feed.

Name: SMICTOM de la région de Fontainebleau
Description:
Etablissement public de coopération intercommunale (EPCI), le SMICTOM de la région de Fontainebleau regroupe 35 communes rurales et semi urbaines situées dans le sud de la Seine-et-Marne, soit 105 000 habitants.

Sa mission principale est l'organisation de la collecte des ordures ménagères et de la collecte sélective sur le territoire.

Depuis 2010, le SMICTOM de la région de Fontainebleau a signé un partenariat avec l’ADEME et le Conseil Régional d’Ile-de-France dans le cadre d’un programme local de prévention des déchets. Ce dernier consiste à se fixer des objectifs ambitieux de réduction de la production de déchets, en accord avec les objectifs du Grenelle de l’environnement. 

Pour atteindre cet objectif, le SMICTOM fait entre autre la promotion du compostage pour les particuliers, les collectifs et les gros producteurs de déchets organiques.

Le SMICTOM intervient également de l’école élémentaire à l’université sur les thèmes du tri, du recyclage, de l’éco-consommation, du compostage…, dans les classes et en extérieur, notamment à l'occasion de sorties ramassage des déchets en forêt de Fontainebleau.

Par ailleurs, le SMICTOM organise depuis 18 ans le Festival Terre Avenir, le rendez-vous local du développement durable.

Name: Bin Masters USA
Description:
At Bin Masters, we are pioneers in providing eco-friendly, efficient, and cost-effective waste management solutions through our innovative 100% electric compaction services. Our mission is to transform waste management by reducing environmental impact, increasing efficiency, and delivering exceptional customer service.

Our proprietary electric compaction vehicles compact waste in open-top dumpsters by as much as 70%, allowing customers to add more waste with fewer hauls, saving time and money. We pride ourselves on our dedication to reducing CO2 emissions and helping businesses achieve their sustainability goals.

100% Electric Compaction: Our electric compaction process is clean, efficient, and environmentally friendly. We eliminate the need for diesel-powered trucks, significantly reducing CO2 emissions.
Rapid and Safe Compaction: Our compactions are quick, taking only 5-6 minutes. Our drivers stay in the cab during compactions, ensuring a safe and efficient process.

Flexible Service Plans: We tailor our services to fit your specific needs, offering various service plans without long-term contracts. Our goal is to be a partner, not just a vendor.
Comprehensive Documentation: We document every compaction with photos and videos, providing transparency and accountability. You'll always know when it's time to call your hauler.

Name: Resource Recovery Coalition of California
Description:
The Resource Recovery Coalition of California was founded over 50 years ago and is comprised of collection and recycling companies operating in over 50 cities and counties throughout California. Many of our member companies are third, fourth, or fifth generation family owners who live in the communities they serve. The solid waste and recycling industry touches every resident and employee in a community, and because our members are part of that same community, they are are committed to being excellent service provides and environmental stewards as well as bolstering the local economy by creating more jobs through recycling.

Alongside their cities and counties, our members have invested considerably in innovative technologies to divert material from the landfill, recycle more and create vital products like renewable energy and compost for agriculture. We are an integral part of the communities we serve and are excited to be at the forefront of California’s climate change initiatives and opportunities.

Name: Binfinity
Description:
At Binfinity, we accelerate the world’s transition to a circular economy by transforming waste management with data, technology, and collaboration.

Our mission: cut residual waste with our customers by at least 40% within 7 years.

We deliver smart, reliable, and user-friendly solutions that make circular progress visible, measurable, and achievable:
→ Binfinity Ident – RFID-based container identification for transparent and fair collection.
→ Binfinity Access – Smart access control enabling better separation of waste.
→ Binfinity CMS – Real-time insights into waste streams, from mini-containers to large collection systems.
→ Binfinity Litter Detect – Automatic detection of side waste and litter around containers.

Our approach is built on open standards, reliable service, simplicity, commitment, and innovation. Together, we help municipalities and waste collectors become more efficient, transparent, and sustainable.

Single stream recycling – everything in one bin: no sorting, separating or bagging. It saves time and space and it is good for the environment.

Name: COLETA SUSTENTÁVEL
Description:
O Coleta Sustentável é um sistema de gestão para os Serviços Públicos de Manejo de Resíduos Sólidos Urbanos (SMRSU), desenvolvido para atender as demandas do serviço público de coleta de resíduos, compreendendo as atividades de coleta, transbordo, transporte, triagem para fins de reutilização ou reciclagem, tratamento e destinação final dos resíduos sólidos urbanos.

UM SISTEMA CAPAZ DE CONTROLAR TODOS OS SERVIÇOS DE COLETA DE RESÍDUOS DOMICILIARES E DE LIMPEZA PÚBLICA.

Com o sistema Coleta Sustentável o Gestor dos Serviços Públicos Municipal de Resíduos Sólidos Urbanos – SMRSU e do Serviço de Limpeza Urbana – SLU podem controlar em tempo real todos os processo/roteiros de coleta de resíduos convencional, seletiva e especial, como também, o serviço de limpeza urbana. Sendo possível obter informações precisas sobre todos os serviços que estão sendo realizados.

O Sistema de Gestão de Coleta Sustentável é um ERP (enterprise resource planning), com ele é possível fazer de todos os processos e serviços em tempo real.

Este ERP é composto por diversos cadastros e controles que vão desde usuários e equipamentos em uso, com um painel de controle em tempo real (dashboard) de equipes, veículos, equipamentos e coleta realizada no dia, acumulado da semana, mês e ano, permitindo realizar o rastreamento de todas as equipes, veículos e serviços que estão sendo realizados.

Pelo Aplicativo do Tablet é possível acompanhar todas equipes e atividades que estão sendo realizadas, sejam de coleta convencional, seletiva, especial ou serviços de limpeza urbana. Nele é possível iniciar roteiro, parar roteiro, lançar pesagem, ocorrências e finalizar os roteiros.

O software de controle de balanças irá funcionar em um computador que poderá estar ligado pela serial diretamente a balança, cabendo ao balanceiro lançar apenas o número do veículo que está sendo pesado. O sistema já informará automaticamente ao sistema de gestão o peso da carga coletada no roteiro que o veículo está realizando na

Name: Waste In Peace
Description:
Make city Green again, Le compresseur intelligent et autonome de déchets Waste In Peace lutte contre l’insalubrité grandissante des villes, il transforme l’image repoussante de la poubelle en un mobilier urbain attractif pour la ville de demain

WIP waste compressor 

Notre Mission? Plus belle la ville!
Waste In Peace propose aux villes et entreprises un compresseur de déchets intelligent et autonome en énergie se plaçant au dessus des poubelles rectangulaires 400 à 1000L, WIP utilise donc l’existant et  présente 4 fonctions principales:
-Compresser les déchets dans les poubelles 400 a 1000L (rectangulaires) par un facteur 5, ceci diminuera fortement l’impact des grèves et les pertes économiques liées au nettoyage des rues
-Autonome en énergie grâce a son panneau solaire et sa batterie lui permettant de fonctionner aussi bien dans le Sud que dans le Nord, par bon temps mais aussi par mauvais temps, et de nuit comme de jour
-Communication du taux de remplissage de la poubelle en temps réel, cela permet par exemple d’optimiser les tournées de collectes de déchets et ainsi diminuer l’empreinte carbone
-Se fondre dans la ville, en effet le WIP est personnalisable a la demande du client par son système d’entretoises extérieures, mais aussi par un habillage ‘‘street-art’’, un affichage publicitaire ou même encore un affichage type services pour les villes. WIP transforme l’image repoussante de la poubelle en un mobilier urbain attractif pour les utilisateurs

A qui s’adresse le compresseur WIP?
-Les mairies
-Les entreprises en charge de la collecte des dechets
-Toutes entreprises ayant un intérêt à compresser et confiner des déchets, 
-et dans un futur proche trier ses déchets 

Le WIP est personnalisable à la demande du client
Plusieurs modèles de personnalisation du compresseur WIP, afin d’en faire un mobilier urbain attractif:
-Un affichage publicitaire, un habillage street art

Name: ECOSWEEE Life EU project
Description:
Enhancing collection of small W/EEE and batteries: The proper management and disposal of small waste electrical and electronic equipment (W/EEE) as well as batteries has become an imperative task, prompting a pressing need for innovative solutions to enhance their collection processes. (Apr 2022-Jan 2025)

What is ECOSWEEE?
ECOSWEEE is a project funded by the European Union within the LIFE programme. It addresses the challenges of environmental pollution and health concerns related to e-waste

Why is ECOSWEEE important?
ECOSWEEE aims to test several methods and incentives to increase the collection rate of small WEEE and portable batteries, addressing challenges in the framework of the European Green Deal.

The project proposes to design and implement 10 new pilots in 8 MS to test the practicability, achievability, usefulness, and viability of different collection strategies and incentives. Strategies to be tested include deposit return, buyback, and other reward schemes, e.g. donation, postal services, other collection routes, involvement of online retail, financial aspects, and improvement of the collection network. Another 12 ongoing or planned initiatives carried out by producer responsibility organisations (PROs) will also provide direct input to the project. Results of the pilot implementation will be analysed on the basis of pre-established criteria and indicators to measure the impacts and effectiveness (success) of the actions implemented, define potential areas of improvement, and provide recommendations to policymakers at MS and EU levels. 

Join the discussion on ECOSWEEE Stakeholder Platform: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/9362100/

Name: Provence TLC
Description:
C’est en 2013 qu’apparait Provence TLC, entreprise d’insertion basée à Vitrolles. Celle-ci est spécialisée dans la collecte, le tri et le recyclage des Textiles, Linges de maison et Chaussures usagés (TLC).
Son objectif est double : encourager le tri afin de réduire les déchets et limiter les Gaz à Effets de Serre (GES), et créer de l’emploi local, pour les personnes en situation d’insertion.
Le principe est simple : une borne est installée et ceux qui souhaitent se débarrasser de vieux vêtements, de linges de maison ou de chaussures les déposent. Une fois collectés, ils sont acheminés vers un centre de tri.
Que se passe-t-il après le tri ? Une grande majorité des TLC sont réemployés, d’autres sont valorisés sous d’autres formes et les textiles non recevables sont transformés en Combustible Solide de Récupération (CSR).

O i9Coleta é uma plataforma Mobile de locação de caçambas estacionárias, aproximando pessoas físicas ou jurídicas que precisam descartar entulhos, com as empresas que fazem a locação das caçambas e realizam a destinação ambientalmente adequada.

SOBRE O APLICATIVO
A plataforma será composta de 5 aplicativos que irão realizar o processo de ponta a ponta, desde a oferta até a cobertura da destinação final.

APLICATIVO CLIENTE FINAL
Aplicativo Web/Mobile, onde o cliente poderá encontrar os locadores de caçambas estacionárias, verificar os modelos e valores, realizar a locação, bem como, acompanhar todo o processo.

APLICATIVO DO LOCADOR DE CAÇAMBAS
Aplicativo Web/Mobile, para que as empresa proprietárias de caçambas estacionárias, possam gerenciar as locações e todas as movimentações operacionais, administrativas e financeiras.

APLICATIVO DO MOTORISTA
Aplicativo Mobile, destinado aos motoristas transportadores de caçambas estacionárias que auxiliará no gerenciamento dos roteiros de entregas e retiradas das caçambas, assim como, o descarte em destinos ambientalmente corretos dos resíduos.

APLICATIVO DE FISCALIZAÇÃO PÚBLICA
Aplicativo Web/Mobile, desenvolvido para atender as necessidades das prefeituras de fiscalizar os locais onde estão estacionadas todas as caçambas, verificar quem locou, a documentação do locador, sua regularidade legal e rastrear qual a destinação dada aos resíduos coletados.

Dagelijks zijn er circa 110 medewerkers actief. Jaarlijks wordt er zo’n 105.000 ton aan grof en fijn huishoudelijk afval ingezameld, waarvan het meeste door SUEZ duurzaam wordt verwerkt. Daarnaast speelt Blink een rol in het aanjagen van de regionale circulaire economie.

Name: Byufuel
Description:
Byufuel is building India’s traceable UCO supply chain — turning street food waste into certified biofuels for global aviation and transport.
We collect used cooking oil, digitize every drop, and move it through a transparent, fraud-proof system to refineries.
This isn’t just collection — it’s infrastructure for the decarbonization era.


Every city has a hidden supply chain — behind every samosa, dosa, or biryani is used cooking oil (UCO) quietly going uncollected, reused unsafely, or dumped illegally. India generates over 3 million tons of this potential biofuel feedstock each year. Most of it? Untraceable.

Byufuel exists to change that.

We’re building the infrastructure to collect, verify, and move UCO from kitchens to biorefineries — powering Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) and biodiesel with full regulatory and carbon traceability. Our platform uses AI, mobile-first collection tools, and real-time tracking to ensure chain-of-custody across every drop of oil.

What we’re solving isn’t just operational — it’s structural:
	•	A black market built on opacity and middlemen
	•	Lack of trust, documentation, and audit trails
	•	Disqualified volumes that fail EU RED-III or LCFS standards
	•	No scalable framework for ethical, verifiable UCO recovery

We work directly with food businesses, city aggregators, and logistics partners to build this from the ground up. Today, we operate across over a dozen cities  across regions and are scaling rapidly across Tier 1 and Tier 2 Indian cities, backed by a experienced team, local trust, and technology that works offline just as well as online.

This is not a trading business. This is climate infrastructure — built in India, for the world.

Avec Twini, la gestion de déchets devient un levier économique et environnemental au service de la performance.

---

Twini is the all-in-one solution for local, circular, and sustainable waste management. 

Twini supports industrial companies in maximizing the value of their waste by leveraging a local network of committed circular economy players. With our simplified approach and role as a single point of contact, we manage the entire waste process—from audit to final recovery—while maximizing recycling.

Description:
MIRA Inventory Building Tools AB
MIRA Inventory Building Tools AB är ett digitalt inventeringsverktyg som guidar och stötta dig genom hela inventeringsprocessen. MIRA kan allt om bygg- och rivningsavfall och hjälper dig att klassa avfallet i rätt allt från det farliga avfallet till avfall som är återvinningsbart. 
MIRA optimerad avfallshanteringen och listar såväl din byggnad resurser som kostnader för avfall från rivning.
Avfallet klassas på den digitala avfallslistan som sen kan användas såväl för din kommun, som vid upphandling av rivningsentreprenör och för din avfallsmottagare. 

Vad vi gör: Vi tillhandahåller ett digitalt inventeringsverktyg som hjälper företag att identifiera, klassificera och hantera avfall från befintliga byggnader som står inför rivning. Vårt verktyg ger råd om vilka material som bör provtas för att bestämma avfallsklass och återvinningsbarhet, vilket optimerar avfallshanteringen och ökar mängden avfall som kan återanvändas och återvinnas.
MIRA ger dig:
•	Råd och guidning: MIRA ger råd om vilka materialprover som bör tas för att avgöra avfallsklass och återvinningsbarhet.
•	Exakt mängduppskattning: MIRA hjälper till att noggrant mängda avfall, vilket säkerställer exakta mängder för alla avfallstyper.
•	Avfallskategorisering: Avfallet listas inte bara som i avfallsklasser utan även som avfall som kan återbrukas, återvinnas och som specifika avfallstyper.
•	Kostnadsberäkning: Verktyget möjliggör beräkning av kostnader för underhåll, sanering, rivning och avfallshantering.
•	Klimatberäkning: Vi tillhandahåller klimatberäkningar för resurser som kan återanvändas eller återvinnas, vilket bidrar till att mer avfall kan återvinnas och resursanvändningen från byggnaden maximeras.

Name: Northern Recycling
Description: Northern Recycling recycles green material, food waste, wood waste, and agricultural waste to create compost, mulch, and biomass fuel. Northern Recycling also provides construction and demolition processing. Northern Recycling, LLC was founded in 2008 by four families, whom together, have over 320 years of experience in the waste industry. Our families have roots in waste management, dating back to the early 1900s when garbage collection services were provided by horse-drawn cart and salvageable food scraps were used to feed pigs and chickens. Northern Recycling began its operations in Zamora, California with just four employees, and in four short years was processing just shy of 100,000 tons per year. In 2022, Northern Recycling opened a brand new, state-of-the-art covered aerated static pile (CASP) composting facility, expanding the region’s composting capacity by over 100,000 tons per year. Northern Recycling has grown to 30+ employees and now manages close to 200,000 tons of organic material per year, accepting material from Yolo County, the City of Fairfield, Napa County, Sacramento City and County, the City of Folsom, the City of El Dorado Hills, Cal Waste, and Paradise County. We are proud to transition from traditional windrow composting to a highly advanced CASP system where we can compost more efficiently, reduce air emissions, and create high quality compost for the community.

De cette initiative locale est née une entreprise prospère, aujourd'hui implantée en Limousin sur plusieurs sites et rassemblant 130 salariés dont 55 en insertion professionnelle.

Nos activités se sont diversifiées pour répondre aux besoins variés des entreprises, des collectivités et des professions libérales. Nous opérons dans la collecte et le démantèlement de produits électriques et électroniques pour le compte des éco-organismes Ecosystem et Ecologic, ainsi que dans la collecte de piles et de sources lumineuses pour Corepile et Ecosystem.

Nous sommes également impliqués dans la collecte et le pré-traitement de divers déchets d’entreprise tels que les papiers, les cartons, le polystyrène, les huiles alimentaires usagées… Notre expertise inclut aussi la collecte de déchets d'activité de soins et de laboratoires (DASRI) pour les professionnels de la santé, en partenariat avec l'éco-organisme DASTRI.

Ce sont aujourd’hui environ 1 600 clients qui nous confient la collecte et le traitement de leurs déchets autour de prestations variés. Pourquoi pas vous ?

Name: Ondiek Ten Top Youth Group
Description:
Introduction to Ondiek Ten Top Youth Group

Ondiek Ten Top Youth Group is a youth-led organization dedicated to transforming waste management in the Ondiek community. For over a decade, we have been actively collecting waste, striving to improve the environmental quality and cleanliness of our area. Partnering with the County Government of Kisumu, we launched a pilot project focused on waste segregation at the source, setting a foundation for sustainable waste management practices in the community.

Our work extends beyond waste collection: we train the community on proper waste segregation techniques and operate a buyback center, where community members can sell their recyclables, reinforcing the importance of reducing waste at the source. With a commitment to innovation, we embrace growth through solutions that prioritize sustainability and community education, all with a vision to create a lasting impact. Our mission is to implement waste management solutions that not only benefit our community today but also serve as a model for future generations.

Name: Waste Gobbler
Description:
The Waste Gobble, a @uniyia_org project aimed at addressing multiple environmental challenges in Accra, Ghana. Specifically, the project aims to retrieve approximately 10,000 tons of waste from the ocean while also promoting circular economy and renewable energy practices.

The first aspect of the project involves ocean clean up. The city of Accra, like many other coastal cities, has a significant problem with marine pollution, including plastic waste. The Waste Gobbler project seeks to retrieve this waste from the ocean, preventing it from further damaging the environment and posing a threat to marine life.

The second aspect of the project is the promotion of circular economy practices. This involves finding ways to reuse or recycle the waste collected, creating a closed-loop system where waste is treated as a resource rather than a problem. By implementing circular economy practices, the project aims to reduce the amount of waste generated in Accra and create economic opportunities for local communities.

The Waste Gobbler project also - will promotes renewable energy practices. The project seeks to use renewable energy sources, such as solar and wind power, to power the waste retrieval and recycling process. By using renewable energy, the project aims to reduce its carbon footprint and promote sustainable practices.

Overall, the Waste Gobbler project is a multifaceted initiative that seeks to address multiple environmental challenges in Accra. By combining ocean clean up, circular economy practices, and renewable energy, the project aims to create a sustainable model for waste management that can be replicated in other cities around the world.

Name: STLG Collecte et Valorisation
Description:
STLG est une entreprise spécialisée dans la collecte et la valorisation des matériaux provenant des chantiers. Ses activités principales se concentrent sur trois métiers :

1.	Collecte des matières par bennes : STLG assure la collecte des matériaux en utilisant des bennes spécialisées, facilitant ainsi le processus de récupération des matières sur les chantiers.

2.	Regroupement et tri : Une fois collectés, ces matériaux sont dirigés vers nos centres de regroupement pour un tri minutieux. Cette étape permet de séparer les différents types de matériaux en vue d'un recyclage optimal.

3.	Préparation des matières pour le recyclage et la valorisation : STLG se charge de préparer les matériaux triés en vue de leur recyclage et de leur valorisation. Cela peut inclure des opérations de traitement spécifiques pour rendre les matières prêtes à être réutilisées dans de nouveaux produits ou dans d'autres industries.

STLG en quatre points clés :

•	Implantation stratégique : La société dispose de multiples sites en Île-de-France, équipés d'infrastructures portuaires, Cela offre une accessibilité accrue et favorise une logistique efficace grâce aux voies navigables.

•	Transport fluvial : En utilisant le transport fluvial, STLG privilégie une approche éco-responsable et contribue à réduire l'empreinte carbone de ses opérations logistiques.

•	Certifications ISO 9001 et 14001 : Ces certifications attestent de la qualité des processus opérationnels et de l'engagement environnemental, respectant des normes et pratiques durables.

•	Centre de regroupement multimodal de Bonneuil classé ICPE : Ce statut garantit le respect des normes environnementales et industrielles, assurant une exploitation conforme aux réglementations en vigueur.

STLG se positionne comme un acteur majeur dans le secteur de la collecte et de la valorisation des matériaux de chantier, en intégrant des pratiques durables et des solutions logistiques innovantes pour contribuer à une économie circulaire.

Ofrecemos soluciones integrales para empresas que buscan mejorar sus tasas de recuperación, cumplir con la Ley REP, fortalecer sus criterios ESG y avanzar hacia una operación más sostenible. Contamos con trazabilidad completa, certificación de procesos y una logística robusta para el retiro, clasificación y valorización de residuos reciclables, tanto domiciliarios como industriales.

Además, creemos que la transformación cultural es clave para el éxito ambiental de cualquier organización. Por eso, acompañamos a nuestros clientes en el proceso de gestión del cambio a través de capacitaciones y programas de educación ambiental, adaptados a cada realidad organizacional.

Nuestra propuesta combina conocimiento técnico, compromiso territorial y un enfoque práctico para acelerar la transición hacia modelos más circulares. Ya sea a través de servicios periódicos de recolección, talleres formativos o asesorías personalizadas, en VerdeSur somos aliados estratégicos de las empresas que quieren hacer las cosas bien —con impacto, con propósito y con resultados medibles.

Gestión Integral. Sustentabilidad en serio. Reciclaje con trazabilidad. Educación que transforma. Eso es VerdeSur.
