Name: La Regratterie
Description:
La Regratterie est un espace unique, axé sur le réemploi. 
À la fois matériauthèque, atelier pour la transmission des savoir-faire, lieu de créations uniques et robustes sur la base du recyclage, cet espace permet de consommer différemment et de revaloriser les métiers manuels. 
Les objectifs de ce lieu sont clairs : surprendre, recycler, sensibiliser.

Nous proposons aux entreprises de prendre en charge sur site des matériaux réutilisables. Nous sommes à la recherche de partenaires qui possèdent des stocks, petits ou grands, de bois, métal, papier, carton, tissu, entre autres (vieux mobiliers et outillages également) susceptibles d’être réemployés et valorisés par de nouveaux utilisateurs : associations, artistes et designers...

Excédents de commande, chutes, erreurs de découpe, stocks invendus... Vos déchets peuvent resservir, mais par manque de place ou de temps vous êtes contraints de les évacuer et de payer le coût de leur traitement. Nous les prenons en charge et les mettons à disposition du plus grand nombre à prix solidaire.

Notre but : démocratiser le réemploi, c'est-à-dire la réutilisation d’un matériau qui est destiné à être jeté. 

Les entreprises donatrices ont de multiples intérêts à donner en nature :

- Elles valorisent des produits considérés comme des déchets.
- Elles économisent des coûts de destruction.
- Elles bénéficient d’une image positive de respect de l’environnement.
- Elles peuvent bénéficier d’une réduction d’impôt.
 
La Regratterie montre l’exemple en étant elle-même actrice de la revalorisation des matières qu’elle récupère !
Grâce à un collectif de créateurs Upcycleurs qui propose des créations engagées, nous donnons une image hautement valorisée du recyclage. Nos matières sont retravaillées, soigneusement réinventées, afin de leur offrir une nouvelle vie. Le résultat : certes un évitement de déchets et une production très peu polluante, mais surtout des pièces durables  qui racontent une histoire à s’approprier…

Name: Gov4GreenMed
Description:
Despite notable improvements in waste collection, treatment, disposal, prevention, control and recycling in recent years, municipal solid and food waste remains a critical challenge across most Mediterranean countries.

Participatory processes are rarely applied to waste management, and both businesses and citizens are typically not actively involved. Gov4GreenMed will design territorial participatory methodologies on municipal solid waste management and food waste policies through five pilot actions in municipalities across Spain, Italy, Türkiye, Jordan and Tunisia. These initiatives aim to foster effective cooperation between local public authorities and various stakeholders and improve the development of local governance models.

The final aim is to facilitate the implementation of shared public services, improve the quality of life of citizens, and support the green transition of Mediterranean municipalities.

Name: Green Republic
Description:
GreenRepublic is Africa’s most progressive integrated recycling and renewable energy social enterprise. We’re on a mission to bring real impactful change to BILLIONS of people and the environment!

WE LIVE SUSTAINABILITY 

Green Republic is leveraging technology to build a conglomerate that gives a hoot about people and the planet, and translating it into business success, advancing sustainability, creating a positive impact and improving lives. We are on our way to becoming the one stop for everything Green from systems to products in Africa.

Green Republic is a leader in developing groundbreaking, simple to use recycling, solar energy and biogas systems and products.

We’re enabling people and organisations in Africa to turn their everyday waste to cash, turn their own organic waste into self-made clean energy, on-site, and also harness solar energy

Green Republic is serving thousands of households, farmers, businesses, schools, churches, underserved communities, and those seeking a more sustainable way of living with thousands of harvested recyclable materials, solar energy systems and biogas systems.

RECYCLING

Our Point-Based recycling system, rewards post consumers with Green Points in exchange for their everyday waste like Used Beverage Cans (UBC), Brown Corrugated Cartons (BCC), PET Plastic Bottles (PET), Pure Water Sachets (PWS), Old Newspapers (ONP) and Glass bottles (GBS). The Green Points can then be used to redeem cash, household items, electronics and vocational training. 

BIOGAS

Our fabricated and prefabricated, fully off-grid systems offer biogas production modular options to suit each of our customer‘s needs, empowering them to live a healthier, more efficient, self-resilient and sustainable life.

SOLAR ENERGY

We are into full Renewable systems which includes Procurement and installations of Conventional and Solar Streetlights, Solar Home and Commercial systems.

Dit begint bij onze LNG wagens waarmee we afval ophalen en loopt vervolgens door in het sorteren en verwerken van de afvalstromen.

Onze kernwaarden zijn:

Betrouwbaar en betrokken
Klantgericht en daadkrachtig
Veilig, gezond en milieubewust werken
Plezierig en respectvol samenwerken
Continu verbeteren, vernieuwen en verduurzamen

Ons verzorgingsgebied is zowel de regio West- en Midden Brabant als de rest van het land. We werken voor bedrijven in diverse sectoren (dienstverlening, projectontwikkeling, aannemerij, handel en industrie), maar ook voor woningbouwverenigingen, (semi-)overheidsinstellingen en particulieren.

Description:
At Baroda Green Minds Pvt Ltd, we are driven by a powerful vision to transform the landscape of recycled plastic usage. We recognize the pressing challenges posed by plastic waste and are dedicated to crafting a more sustainable future through innovative solutions.

Vision: Our vision is to create a world where recycled plastic is not just an alternative but the preferred choice for industries. We aspire to reduce the environmental burden of plastic waste while creating economic opportunities through our endeavors.

Mission: Our mission is to revolutionize the perception of recycled plastic granules by providing high-quality, eco-friendly solutions that meet the stringent demands of modern businesses. We aim to empower industries to make responsible choices without compromising on functionality.

Values: Rooted in integrity, innovation, and collaboration, we are a team of dedicated professionals committed to making a positive impact. Our values drive us to deliver products that reflect our passion for environmental stewardship and technological advancement.

Positioning: What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to quality and sustainability. Our recycled plastic granules offer not just a sustainable alternative but a superior option that aligns with the performance requirements of various industries. We bridge the gap between ecological responsibility and industrial needs.

Products/Services: At the core of our offerings are premium recycled plastic granules that adhere to the highest industry standards. These granules, derived from carefully sourced plastic waste, cater to a wide range of applications across industries such as packaging, automotive, construction, and more. We provide the building blocks for a circular economy, where plastic finds new life without harming the planet.

Join us in our journey to redefine the role of recycled plastic granules in shaping a sustainable tomorrow.

#RecycledPlasticInnovation #SustainableMaterials #CircularEconomy

Name: JunkStart Junk Removal
Description:
JunkStart: Rethinking Junk Removal and Franchising

At JunkStart, we believe waste removal should be simple, fair, and transparent. That’s why we introduced the nation’s first pay-by-weight model with custom onboard scales so you only pay for what we take with no surprises or hidden costs.

Whether you’re a homeowner, contractor, or property manager, we make junk removal easy, efficient, and stress-free. Our friendly, professional crews show up on time, handle every job with care, and leave your space cleaner than you expected. For entrepreneurs, JunkStart offers franchise opportunities built for today’s market with a proven system backed by innovation, training, and real support from people who care about your success.

Why Choose JunkStart
Traditional volume-based pricing often leaves customers overpaying. Our pay-by-weight system ensures you know exactly what you’re paying for so you’re never stuck covering unused space. With JunkStart, you get straightforward pricing, superior service, and a brand built on integrity and transparency.

What We Offer
• Residential Junk Removal: Pay only for what we take with no hidden fees or gimmicks.
• Construction Waste Solutions: Live-load service that keeps your job site efficient and clutter-free.
• Property Management Support: Recurring cleanups to keep your properties looking their best.
• Franchise Opportunities: Own a business that’s changing the game with strong margins, real training, and the backing of a team that’s redefining the industry.

Our Mission
We built JunkStart to serve people better through fairness, transparency, and a hassle-free experience. With hundreds of five-star reviews and a growing franchise network, we’re proving that doing right by people leads to long-term success.

Pay by Weight, Not by Chance.

Allied is not just your bin provider but also a source of information on how to save money and assist your household to reduce, reuse and recycle waste. POIL Group is a certified ISCC company at the forefront of sustainable UCO (Used Cooking Oil) collection. We lead in pioneering sustainable collection and storage processes of UCO to be recycled and repurposed for the production of eco-friendly biofuels.

With over a decade of experience in the market, our logistics team comprises a well-equipped and extensively trained fleet of collectors of UCO. These collectors consist of both loyal freelancers who have a strong affinity for our brand and in-house collectors.

POIL Group consistently handles an impressively growing average of 2500 Metric Tonnes of UCO per month. This volume reflects the efficiency and effectiveness of our operations.

In essence, our extensive experience, competent team, and steadfast commitment to client satisfaction set us apart as a distinguished player in the industry, and a leader in the region.

POIL Group presently operates in seven markets (Lebanon, Jordan, Egypt, UAE, KSA, Qatar, Armenia), with additional expansion plans in progress.

We reimagine how waste can be reintegrated into the economy after the estimated lifespan of the products or activities from which they originate. 

In Romania, we are the most dynamic group of companies in construction industry, employing over 2600 colleagues across all our business lines and operating over 54 units national wide managed through our legal entities: Sapphire Energy, Romcim, Elpreco, Ferrobeton, Baulemente, and TehnoWorld.

Name: Melta
Description:
Melta er nýsköpunarfyrirtæki sem hefur frá 2020 unnið að því að þróa nýja closed-loop zero-emission hringrásarlausn fyrir lífrænan heimilisúrgang sveitarfélaga á landsbyggðinni. Melta er gjörsamlega ný nálgun í úrgangsmálum og spannar allt ferlið frá því hvernig lífrænt hráefni er flokkað á heimilum íbúa, hvernig því er safnað, það meðhöndlað og lífræna áburðinn sem framleiddur er í meðhöndlunarferlinu. Heilt á litið er Melta því bæði þjónustuferli við íbúa, meðhöndlunarferli og efnisleg vara. 

Melta is an innovative company that has been working since 2020 to develop an effective closed-loop, zero-emission solution for organic household waste in rural municipalities. Melta’s new and thorough approach to waste addresses the entire system — from the residential experience of sorting waste at home, to the municipal process of collection and treatment, to the application and utilization of organic material as a fertilizer. Melta spans the system from service to product by recirculating a domestic resource for local utilization.

Name: Aloha Junk Man LLC
Description:
Aloha Junk Man is a premier junk removal service dedicated to helping Oahu residents and businesses reclaim their spaces while prioritizing environmental sustainability. Embodying the true spirit of aloha, we combine professional service with eco-conscious practices to transform cluttered environments throughout our island home.

Our Mission:
To provide exceptional junk removal services that honor our island's limited resources through responsible disposal practices, supporting a cleaner, more organized Oahu for generations to come.

Our Services:

Residential junk removal
Bulky Item Removal
Illegal Dumping
Commercial waste management
Estate cleanouts and property clearing
Construction debris removal

Same-day service across Oahu

At Aloha Junk Man, we're committed to more than just hauling away unwanted items. We carefully sort all collected materials to maximize recycling and donation opportunities, significantly reducing landfill contributions. Our team is trained to identify reusable items that can benefit local charitable organizations and families in need. As a locally owned business, we understand Oahu's unique environmental challenges. We actively participate in beach cleanups and community beautification projects, reinforcing our commitment to preserving our island's natural beauty. By choosing Aloha Junk Man, you're supporting a business that reinvests in our local community.

Name: CLEAN.

Name: Ishara
Description:
Ishara is building a tech-enabled system for ethical plastic recovery in growth markets.

We work across the plastic waste value chain—from informal waste pickers to recyclers—providing tools that make plastic collection traceable, fair, and visible. Through tech-backed buyback centers, blockchain tracking, and partnerships with local actors, we’re formalizing plastic recovery, improving working conditions, and unlocking value where it’s been overlooked.

Our goal: a circular economy that works for everyone, starting from the ground up.

Name: DumpStor of Salt Lake
Description: Embrace the convenience of hassle-free waste management with DumpStor of Salt Lake, your trusted partner for all your dumpster rental needs. Name: Kramer Enterprises LLC
Description:
Kramer Enterprises LLC is a proud family-owned waste management and recycling company serving the Washington, DC, Maryland, and Virginia region since 2015.

Founded by two college graduates with a shared vision, we have grown from a single truck into a trusted operation with a fleet of 15+ trucks and 50+ employees. Today, we are recognized as one of the fastest-growing waste management companies in the DC Metro Area, delivering reliable, efficient, and sustainable solutions for commercial, residential, and municipal clients.

At Kramer Enterprises, we are committed to more than just waste removal — we are dedicated to building stronger communities. We prioritize safety, workforce development, and community partnerships that support recycling initiatives, sustainability efforts, and local job creation.

Our mission is simple: to provide dependable waste management services while promoting environmental responsibility and creating opportunities for people and communities to thrive.

Name: Rezbin
Description: Rezbin makes waste disposal easy and fun for Filipinos. We are building the technology and infrastructure to formalize the waste sector, reduce the plastics that end up in landfills and oceans, and help brands offset their plastic production.

Name: Graystone Services
Description: Graystone Services provides roll-off dumpster rentals for residential and commercial projects across Southwest Florida. Based in Englewood, Florida, our yard offers easy access to Boca Grande and the surrounding barrier islands. We specialize in serving high-end coastal properties with reliable, concierge-style service. Our fleet includes modern roll-off trucks and trailers built to handle tight-access sites efficiently. Whether it's new construction, renovation, or debris removal, we deliver fast, professional waste solutions tailored to your job.

Name: ISE - Ingénierie Service Environnement
Description:
Depuis 1995, I-S-E accompagne les entreprises dans la gestion de leurs déchets en mettant en place des solutions de collecte adaptées à leur nature et volume (DIB, papier, carton, bois, plastique, verre, métaux...). 

Implantée en Île de France, I-S-E offre à ses clients un accompagnement efficace, de proximité et de qualité. Tout débute par un diagnostic précis des flux de déchets pour définir les dispositifs les plus performants, en adéquation avec les infrastructures des clients. 

I-S-E assure l’enlèvement et l’acheminement des déchets dans le respect des délais, de la règlementation et des filières de valorisation (tri, incinération, recyclage ou méthanisation). Chaque collaborateur I-S-E est formé et impliqué dans une démarche exigeante de service ! 

I-S-E assure une prestation complète incluant : 
Traçabilité : Mise à jour des Registres de suivi, conformément à la réglementation en vigueur. Les clients accèdent à un reporting complet des collectes effectuées depuis leur espace en ligne. 

Conformité réglementaire : accompagnement sur les obligations (BSD, registre déchets...).

Tri sélectif : Accompagnement et sensibilisation des salariés et intérimaires de ses clients via des outils pédagogiques et des visites sur site pour optimiser le tri des déchets. En cas de déclassement I-S-E s’engage à proposer des solutions rapidement.

Optimisation logistique : Les tournées sont optimisées en fonction de leur localisation et de la fréquence des enlèvements. À jour fixe ou après une demande notifiée, I-S-E s’engage à les collecter sous 24h. 

I-S-E a mis en place un éco-management afin de minimiser son impact sur l’environnement. Réductions de consommation de ressources, maîtrise des rejets dans l’eau et l’air, maîtrise des nuisances sonores..., I-S-E est réellement engagée dans une démarche éco- responsable. 

I-S-E, c’est + 800 clients, +700 bennes et compacteurs et 60 000 tonnes de déchets et cartons collectés par an.

Name: Cympro
Description:
Cympro SAS nace de ver tantos proyectos fallidos en diferentes industrias ya sea por falta de conocimiento, experiencia o gestión generando incumplimiento en alcance, tiempo y/o costo.

Es por ello que nos soportamos en la experiencia de los socios y aliados estratégicos en los diferentes campos para poder ofrecer el mejor servicio posible al cliente, tratando una variedad de situaciones como especialistas en cada una de las áreas.

- Gestión de Residuos de Construcción (RCD), Especiales y Peligrosos
- Gerencia de Proyectos
- Mantenimiento Industrial
- Fabricaciones Metalmecanicas

Name: D3e'A
Description:
Créée en 2011, D3e'A est une entreprise adaptée spécialisée dans le traitement de tous types de déchets, et notamment, dans le démantèlement des Déchets d’Équipements Électriques et Électroniques (DEEE). 

La vingtaine de collaborateurs en situation de handicap de D3e’A apporte son expertise, sa valeur ajoutée et son professionnalisme, au cœur d’une approche de traitement des déchets à 360°, certifiée ISO 9001 et à fort impact durable.

Partageant toutes deux des valeurs fortes liées à l'économie circulaire, D3e'A est devenue filiale de l'entreprise adaptée Handiprint. Ainsi, la gestion de TOUS vos déchets est maitrisée : de la collecte à la valorisation, en passant par la rénovation, le tri et le démantèlement.

Name: 4R  Environment and Energy
Description: Nadir Metal Refinery, which was established in 1967, laid the foundations of the first gold refinery on the country's soil in 1996, cooperated with the German company Degussa in return for a partnership with technology "know-how" in 1999 and established the Nadir - Allgemina company. Continuing its activities by purchasing the entire company in 2001, Nadir completed all basic investments in 2002, and in 2006 Nadir Metal Rafineri A.Ş. It was accredited to the Istanbul Gold Exchange in January 2008, to the Dubai Exchange in October 2009 and to the LBMA - London Bullion Market Association in December 2011. Today, it produces and trades precious metals, as well as refining, ramat, waste recycling and laboratory services. Nadir, which is Turkey's leading noble metal recovery and refining facility, has an annual processing capacity of 125 tons of gold and 250 tons of silver. Nadir, which takes its place among the top 100 in the list of "Turkey's Greatest Leaders" every year and prepares the first and only "Sustainability Report" of the sector, has added a new facility to its international technological level facilities and established 4R Çevre ve Enerji San. ve Tic. A.Ş. has been established.

Name: Terra

Að skilja ekkert eftir er þýðing á Zero Waste sem er alþjóðlegt átak um að bæta umgengni við jörðina með því að draga úr mengun og minnka sóun. 

Fyrirtækið hefur starfað við flokkun og söfnun endurvinnslu efna frá árinu 1984 og vinnur með fyrirtækjum, sveitarfélögum og einstaklingum í endurvinnslu og umhverfisvænni úrgangsstjórnun með áherslu á að koma öllum þeim efnum sem falla til í viðeigandi farveg og aftur inn í hringrásarhagkerfið.

Description:
Sevenseas International is a well-established company with over 16 years of experience in the recycling and packaging industry. To preserve tomorrow’s environment, and in response to the increasing demand for recyclable materials, we offer a smart strategic solution for your waste. 

With a specialism in purchasing and selling of flexible packaging materials, such as paper, plastics and aluminium, we deal in various grades of secondary raw materials. 

Sevenseas work hard to provide the best service and value for money to our clientele through eco-friendly business activities. With an excellent presence in Europe, we partner with different businesses from the industry, and act as a link between waste producers and end consumers, regardless of the waste type, volume, and location. We work closely with various manufactures, printers, converters, packaging factories and waste management companies.

Description:
RMC Polska Sp. z o.o. powstała na bazie wieloletnich doświadczeń zawodowych kadry menadżerskiej Spółki. Nasze doświadczenie zbieraliśmy na rynku Polskim oraz Europejskim zajmując się obrotem złomem czarnym, złomem metali kolorowych oraz recyklingiem elementów zawierających w/w metale.

Nasze doświadczenia oraz znajomość procesów biznesowych, mechanizmów rządzących rynkiem a także kluczowych wartości dla naszych klientów/kontrahentów pozwoliła zbudować Firmę, która jest w stanie spełnić wszelkie nawet najwyżej postawione oczekiwania.

Naszą MISJĄ jest zapewnienie najwyższej jakości obsługę klienta zapewniając mu uczciwe i transparentne transakcje handlowe realizowane w najwyższych światowych standardach w sposób przyjazny dla środowiska, zgodny ze społeczną odpowiedzialnością biznesu (CSR) oraz polityką bezpieczeństwa i higieny pracy.

Name: The Recycling Partnership Limited
Description: The Recycling Partnership was started by a small team of people who were frustrated by the lack of recycling facilities available to businesses. Our first truck was dedicated to the collection of recyclables in the city of Brighton and Hove.  As the word spread and demand grew our business expanded and our services developed into the multi collection systems that we can offer today.  We now offer service coverage across the South East of England and operate a fleet of multi collection vehicles along with our own recycling centre. Our focus is the same as when the business first began, to help businesses reduce the amount of waste that they produce and recycle more.

Name: The Junkluggers of Chicago NW Suburbs
Description:
Thoughtful Junk Removal & Donation

Keeping unwanted items out of landfills whenever possible

The Junkluggers declutters your space while also protecting the environment.

The Junkluggers believes that it's critical to take care of our planet today to ensure a bright future for our children tomorrow. The amount of waste that ends up in landfills on a daily basis is astounding — so we decided to be more conscious of our contributions.

Josh Cohen, The Junkluggers CEO, has been working to protect the environment since he was a college student lugging around and recycling his first refrigerator. The Junkluggers was born out of the days Josh spent hauling unwanted items in his mom's Dodge Durango to be recycled or donated.

We are working toward this goal every day, searching for new charities to partner with and more environmentally friendly ways to dispose of the materials we lug away.

Name: Ecocenter.biotec | Soluções Ambientais
Description:
Soluções personalizadas de gestão de resíduos

Name: Ahern Waste Management & Recycling Services
Description:
Ahern Waste Management & Recycling Services was established in Harold Hill in 1948 by our founder Patrick Ahern. Initially the business comprised two Bedford 5 yd3 dropsided tipping vehicles which collected wastes from the roadside for onward transport to the local disposal sites.

In 1961 the company relocated to Crow Lane, Romford and added a fleet of skip vehicles to service the growing demand for waste services in the East London area. By the late 1960’s the fleet had been further expanded with the addition of mobile compaction vehicles and container. The company began to operate transfer stations and landfills for industrial and commercial wastes.

Throughout the 1970’s and 1980’s the company continued to provide waste management services for a diverse range of waste producers. This included the supply of secure containers for the safe disposal of asbestos at our own landfill site. In the early 1990’s Basildon transfer station and operating centre was established to service the needs of waste producers in South Essex.

In 2005 Ahern transferred their head office and main operational activities from Crow Lane to a purpose built Materials Recovery Centre in Oliver Close, West Thurrock.

Contact Our Team for more Information.

The advantage of working with us is that for every client we sign, you are enabling some one to have a job. No paperwork. Download our app and request a collection.

Name: El Fares For Waste Management
Description: ELFARES, established in 2013, a leading Egyptian company in the field of waste management, which aims to provide effective environmental solutions, across all service sectors, which directly contribute to achieving an environment free of pollutants.

Name: Réseau Cycl'Organique
Description:
L'association Cycl'Organique, créée en 2023, a pour but de promouvoir à l'échelle nationale la collecte de biodéchets en mobilité douce et leur valorisation par compostage de proximité par le soutien des structures locales qui mettent en place ce type de solution, dans un but de préservation de l’environnement et dans une logique d’Economie Sociale et Solidaire.

Pour cela elle utilise les moyens suivants :
> Représenter solidairement ses membres à l'échelle nationale auprès des institutions et autres publics concernés par la gestion des déchets.

> Partager les connaissances et échanger les pratiques entre ses membres.

> Accompagner l’émergence de nouveaux projets et la pérennisation de l’activité de ses membres.

Name: Kapasity Oy
Description:
Yritystoimintamme käsittää jäte- ja ympäristöhuollon teknisten laitteiden ja palveluiden myyntiä Suomessa ja Ruotsissa, päämarkkina-alue on Suomi. Valmistamme ja kunnostamme itse jätehuollon laitteita vuokrattavaksi asiakkaillemme konevuokraamomme kautta. Tehdaskunnostamme vanhoja jätehuollon koneita uudenveroisiksi laitteiksi, jolloin koneille saadaan pitkä elinkaari ja valmistuksen materiaaleja kulutetaan vähemmän. Missionamme on saada uusien koneiden valmistus ja myynti minimiin Pohjois-Euroopassa. Tällä hetkellä vuositasolla uusia laitteita myydään 2.000–2.500 Suomessa ja Pohjoismaissa n. 12.000. Jokaisen uuden valmistettavan laitteen hiilijalanjälki on 23-26 tuhatta kiloa. Tästä uusien koneiden tarpeesta noin 90 % saataisiin käyttämällä jo markkinoilla olevia laitteita hallitsemalla niitä älykkäästi ja tehdaskunnostamalla tarpeen mukaan.

Jätteiden kierrätyksen osalta haluamme ajaa jätealaa siihen roolin missä sen olisi pitänyt olla jo alusta alkaen, eli kerätä muiden toimijoiden tuotannosta aiheutuvat materiaalien sivuvirrat prosessoitavaksi ja palauttaa nämä uutena materiaalina markkinoille. Tarjoamme asiakkaillemme alustallamme (easywaste.fi) älykkäitä jätehuollon sopimuksia, joissa koko jätehuolto on keskitetty yhdelle sopimukselle eli kokoamme markkinoilla toimivien toimittajien palveluista parhaan palvelukokonaisuuden asiakkaillemme. Asiakkaat saavat näin kustannussäästöjä ja parasta tarvitsemaansa palvelua.

Compost Queen operates a network of decentralized farms that recycle local food waste into high quality soil amendments. This concept, known as MUCCs (Microsite Urban Community Composting) won an Emerging Composter Challenge Award at the USCC Compost 2022 convention. We have since scaled up our operation with the assistance of a Front Range Waste Diversion Grant, and recently won the Small Compost Manufacturer of the Year award at the USCC Compost 2023 convention. 

Our mission as a Public Benefit Corporation is to make a lasting impact on the local environment by stopping greenhouse gas pollution and rebuilding local soils.

We care about the environment, and that's why we strive to minimize our ecological footprint. We practice responsible disposal methods, recycling and donating items whenever possible, to divert as much waste from landfills as we can.

• les déchets inertes en 3 catégories

SOVEEA, structure dédiée à cette activité, est chargée de collecter les déclarations (quantités d'emballages mises sur le marché) et de récupérer les contributions financières correspondant à la collecte et recyclage.
Dans le cadre d'une convention pluri annuelle, SOVEEA confie à ADIVALOR la gestion de la récupération et la valorisation des emballages usés.
Par cette action de recyclage, SOVEEA participe à une démarche liée à l'économie circulaire.
Suite à l'accord-cadre avec le MTE, en 2003, comme les autres acteurs de l'agrofourniture, nous mettons en place l'éco-modulation (Bonus-Malus) qui impactera l'éco-contribution des déclarations afin d'améliorer la recyclabilité des emballages et de booster l'incorporation de matière première recyclée dans la fabrication des futurs emballages.

Name: INSTA TRASH
Description:
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
As a general cleaning company, our ultimate goal is to be the lead one stop solution to all hygiene, sanitation and waste / garbage collection management challenges in the whole of Uganda. lnsta Trash is one of the subsidiaries of lnsta wash Uganda making up the 5th department of the company. 
According to Kampala City Council Authority, it is estimated that the per capita generation of garbage is one kilogram per day. With a population of about 1.5 million, this works out to about 1500 tons of garbage collected from house holds and commercial entities per day. However, because almost 80% of the garbage is organic matter, it makes it very bulky to handle, allowing the city authority in its current capacity to ably manage disposing off 40% - 50% of the total garbage in the whole of Kampala city. This leaves the other 50-60% to private contractors to supplement.

As the country's population grows, the economy equally develops creating a number of inventions which in turn increase the amount of waste in the communities. The extension of the cities into residential areas has made garbage disposal quite a challenge contributing to an unhealthy environment, risking the health of the inhabitants. We at lnsta Trash work closely with our clients in ensuring that we advance efficiency and effectiveness, so as to help our clients live a healthy and safe environment in their homes and work places. This increases your recycling and minimizes the amount of waste that is sent to the landfills.

OUR VISION
To be Uganda’s most innovative and trusted partner in smart waste management, driving behavioral change, improving sanitation, promoting recycling and environmental safety.

OUR MISSION
To deliver timely, reliable, and environmentally conscious garbage collection and waste disposal services through modern systems, customer-friendly platforms, and community-focused programs that contribute to a cleaner and greener Uganda.

Description:
We develop and implement collection solutions for governments, municipalities, and retailers to make it globally possible to efficiently collect plastic, aluminium, cartons, and other recyclable materials. 

As the global concern surrounding packaging waste intensifies, Bottlebank emerges as a pioneering company offering a unique and sustainable approach to address this pressing issue. With a clear distinction from conventional Deposit Return Scheme (DRS) solutions, Bottlebank operates on a profit basis and eliminates the need for deposits, setting us apart from existing models. 

Unlike traditional DRS systems that require consumers to pay a deposit upfront, Bottlebank revolutionizes the industry by embracing the concept of the refundable single-use plastic tax. We firmly believe that a profit-based approach can drive positive change, making sustainable packaging more accessible to individuals, businesses, and communities worldwide.  

We are proud to announce that the planning of our initial pilot phase has begun, and we will begin the implementation of the pilot project in the Spring 2024.

The main force of the Company EKO UNIJA SN is its team of 30 highly educated and qualified experts, who cover all field operations, trade, marketing and finances.

OUR STRATEGY

Description:

Oavsett vad ni behöver hjälp med kopplat till avfall och återvinning hjälper vi er. Vi har ett brett utbud av återvinningstjänster som är anpassade för att möta olika behov och krav. Allt för att göra det enkelt och effektivt för våra kunder. Detta inkluderar till exempel:

- Löpande hämtning av avfall på schema
- Designade och kontorsanpassade produkter
- Hämtning och destruering av sekretessmaterial
- Stor och små engångshämtningar

Oavsett bransch eller upplägg arbetar vi alltid nära våra kunder för att identifiera de unika behoven samt erbjuda en hög nivå av personlig service.

Genom att alltid anpassa upplägget efter era önskemål och jobba med kontinuerliga förbättringar hjälper vi er att hitta den bästa lösningen för er samtidigt som ni maximerar er återvinningspotential och bidra till en hållbar framtid.

Vi tror på att människor gör affärer med människor och att en personlig kontakt med en hög kvalitet är grunden för ett riktigt bra samarbete, oavsett vad man jobbar med.

Service tillsammans med behovsanpassade upplägg, där man gör det lätt att hantera sitt avfall på ett miljövänligt sätt, var premissen som Wasteless grundades på.

Name: Projet P6
Description:
Projet P6 s'adresse à la problématique du recyclage du styromousse, aussi appelé polystyrène ou plastique numéro 6 (P6), au Québec.  En effet, on consomme chaque année environ 92 000 tonnes de plastique numéro 6, qui finiront la plupart du temps enfouies ou incinérées. Ce plastique, qui se retrouve dans les emballages à usage unique, la construction et la protection de marchandise, n’est pas recyclé dans la grande majorité des municipalités de la province. La mauvaise gestion de sa fin de vie a un impact majeur sur l’environnement en émettant des gaz à effet de serre et en contaminant notre territoire.

Pour répondre à cette enjeux, Projet P6 a créer un réseau de collecte innovant et efficace pour capter le styromousse en donnant le pouvoir d'agir à l'écosystème montréalais! De plus, nous avons inventer une machine qui permet de reconditionner directement et sans intermédiaire cette matière en différent produit comme du rembourrage et bientôt en de nouveaux matériaux de construction. Notre produit phare actuel est notre Bean bags écologique et responsable que vous pouvez trouver sur notre site internet ... 

Vous êtes une entreprise, une municipalité, une coop ou un immeuble d'habitation et vous voulez avoir un impact positif sur l'environnement en recyclant votre styromousse? C'est maintenant possible en contactant Projet P6 !!!

Description:
Styro-Go is a mobile polystyrene recycling company servicing businesses and municipalities across Western Canada. 

The process for recycling polystyrene based products is both complicated and capital intensive. Styro-Go was formed to address these two primary issues. Styro-Go provides companies and municipalities with a more affordable alternative to landfills. 

Polystyrene currently accounts for approximately 30% of our landfills by volume. Our goal is to reduce the amount of polystyrene going into landfills by up to 80%.

Name: The Waste App
Description: We are designed to link customers and waste collectors together, this quick and easy process is all done by using our app. We have collectors registered with us that are in your area looking for jobs to carry out. All our collectors go through a strict administration to check they have all relevant licences to collect and dispose of waste legally. Once you have posted pictures and description of waste it is sent out within seconds to collectors nearby, or who are heading in your direction to do jobs. This making it a very sustainable and cheaper way of having your waste removed. Collectors will either agree to your move it now price or make an offer that they are prepared to move it for. Once you have agreed a price and time with a collector the job is booked and your details will become known to the collector, after job is complete both parties upload after pictures of waste removed and customer pays using our online payment facility, at no point must any cash be passed to collector unless you are giving him a tip for his services. After the job is completed and paid for an email is generated and sent to your selves of proof of payment and duty of care note (duty of care note shows where waste was collected from and disposed of ).

Name: ZAKB
Description:
Als kommunaler Entsorger sammelt, verwertet und beseitigt der ZAKB seit 2002 alle Abfälle aus privaten Haushalten im Kreis Bergstraße. Gemeinsam mit seiner Tochtergesellschaft, der ZAKB Energie und Dienstleistungs GmbH, beschäftigt er rund 280 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter und betreibt zahlreiche eigene Anlagen an mehreren Standorten in der Region – von einem Abfallwirtschaftszentrum, über Wertstoffhöfe und Sammelstellen bis hin zu einem Energiepark. Durch die Nutzung von Sonne, Biomasse und Deponiegas versorgt der ZAKB jährlich mehrere hundert Haushalte mit Wärme und Strom aus erneuerbaren Energieträgern. So leistet der Zweckverband einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Energiewende im Kreis Bergstraße.

Entstanden ist der ZAKB durch den Zusammenschluss von Städten und Gemeinden im Kreis Bergstraße, um für alle Bürger:innen eine Abfallentsorgung aus einer Hand zu organisieren. Derzeit hat der Verband 22 Mitglieder.

Description:

Name: Subcontain
Description:
Introducing the biggest innovation in commercial trash collection in the U.S. in over 50 years.

Subcontain is revolutionizing waste management with the Dumpster of the Future — a vertically engineered, partially underground container system designed to be smarter, cleaner, quieter, and more space-efficient than anything on the market today.

Born from decades of proven real-world experience in Subcontain tackles the most overlooked challenge in business operations: trash. Traditional dumpsters are bulky, smelly, unsightly, and inefficient. Subcontain flips the script by introducing an inground vertical containment system that:

- Frees up parking and patio space
- Reduces odor, pests, and illegal dumping
- Uses gravity for self-compaction, increasing capacity & lowering pickup costs
- Locks securely and can track fill levels for optimized hauls
- Creates less noise when emptying
- Meets modern demands for sustainability and aesthetics

Inspired by proven systems across Europe and Canada, Subcontain is the first U.S.-based company to bring a scalable, franchise-ready model to the market. Backed by real-world operational insight and a deep commitment to innovation, we’re making it easier than ever for businesses to operate cleaner, smarter, and more profitably.

Now expanding nationwide through franchising, Subcontain empowers business owners to join a bold movement in sustainable infrastructure - just beneath the surface.

 Learn more at subcontain.com

Name: Waste Revolution
Description:
We are Australia’s leading Plastic Neutral certification - helping brands take decisive action against the plastic crisis. 

91% of our waste ends up in landfill or flushes into our environment. As consumers are waking up to this, they are demanding action from their favourite brands. 

However, finding more sustainable alternatives can be challenging, and companies are looking for a solution that is both cost-effective and sustainable.  

Waste Revolution can help you take decisive action that goes far beyond just words and promises to do better. Our mission is to help sustainably-minded brands take action against the Plastic Crisis today. 

For every kilogram of plastic you put into the environment, we guarantee that one kilogram that would otherwise have gone to landfill is collected or recycled on your behalf. We do this through funding Australian recyclers and supporting community initiatives. 

Going Plastic Neutral is a way for companies to take immediate action, as they transition to more sustainable and circular business models. 

It’s time to make a change. Don’t be left behind as consumers put sustainability at the forefront of their purchasing decisions.

As a local company, we take pride in knowing the communities we serve and the people behind the service. Our team shows up every day committed to reliability, accountability, and respect—values that guide our operations and our relationships with customers, partners, and employees alike.

Tiger Sanitation is more than a service provider; we’re an essential part of the communities we call home. Through dependable service, community involvement, and continuous improvement, we strive to build cleaner environments and stronger connections—one route, one customer, and one neighborhood at a time.

Name: Circularball
Description:
Circularball is a UK tennis and padel ball recycling initiative, with complete traceability. 

The entire ball (cloth and rubber) is 100% recycled back into new circular products, right here in the UK!

 We collect used balls of any brand in our bins

 We shred, separate and process them with our technology

 We make new cool circular products

325 million tennis balls are made each year. The majority end up in landfill. It is a global issue, Circulaball is the only local solution. With our recycling and manufacturing facilities located in the UK, our low carbon circular solution ensures all materials collected remain in the UK

hubba, is a circular economy specialist devising waste management solutions to keep all waste streams in circulation rather than sending them to landfill or incineration.

Circularball is a hubba initiative

Join us on our mission to make tennis and padel sustainable!

 Redução Real de Custos – Gestão inteligente que diminui despesas, evita desperdícios e maximiza o valor dos materiais recicláveis.

Description:
Ron Smith Recycling Ltd is an established family business with more than 35 years’ experience in recycling and waste disposal. We operate our own Licensed Waste Transfer Station using the latest waste separation systems and collect waste using our modern fuel efficient transport fleet.

Ron Smith Recycling is based at Feltham Middlesex which enables us to service most of inner London and the surrounding counties. Not only do we provide waste disposal and recycling services but we also build and manufacture waste separation systems which we have installed in various waste transfer stations throughout London. We aim to recycle 100% of waste produced and we are constantly looking at ways of improving as we believe recycling is the way forward to a green cleaner environment.

We have built a good relationship with our customers we know and understand how important reliability and service is to them. We pride ourselves on providing a professional fast efficient service and understanding our customer’s requirements. We have a team of experienced advisors who are committed in helping you solve all your waste disposal needs, whilst being competitive on price. Our entire fleet of vehicles are radio controlled and tracked so we can communicate and see exactly where our vehicles are at all times, enabling us to deliver a first class service.

R S Skips is committed to reducing the amount of waste going to landfill. This has required significant investment in plant, machinery, and people to maximise the efficiency of the recycling operation.

Description:
As an ISO quality assured company with over 50 years of experience in the waste management industry, we ensure we deliver the highest standard waste management services. We specialise in the waste management of commercial, industrial and municipal waste streams for all types of businesses throughout Greater Manchester and Lancashire. 

Our primary focus is providing the best possible services for our customers at great prices while also ensuring that our services are environmentally friendly with exceptional recycling rates. Our modern, state-of-the-art facilities ensure we remain at the forefront of the waste management industry with recycling rates exceeding 90% of the waste that we collect.

Como parte do Grupo Ambiensys, líder nacional em gestão ambiental integrada desde sua fundação em 1997, a Reversa traz consigo a herança de uma tradição de excelência e inovação.

Nossa atuação concentra-se em Curitiba-PR e na região metropolitana, onde desempenhamos serviços de coleta, transporte e destinação final de resíduos, locação de mão de obra e equipamentos, além da comercialização de recicláveis. Buscamos não apenas a eficiência operacional, mas o impacto positivo no meio ambiente.

A Reversa assume a sucessão da Lógica Gerenciamento de Resíduos e Reciclagem. Em 2023, consolidamos essa transição ao assumir a carteira de clientes e adquirir os ativos dessa respeitável empresa. Este marco estratégico reforça nosso comprometimento em oferecer soluções ainda mais abrangentes e inovadoras aos nossos parceiros e clientes. Ao unir experiência consolidada e uma visão voltada para o futuro, estamos moldando o caminho para uma gestão ambiental mais eficiente e sustentável.

Juntos, estamos construindo um futuro mais sustentável, onde a responsabilidade ambiental e o progresso harmonizam-se para criar valor duradouro.

We are dedicated to ensuring hassle-free waste disposal services for our clients, so they can focus on what matters most to them. With over a decade of experience, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional customer service and regulatory compliance. 

Our story starts in 2011, when BioWaste, Inc was founded and began servicing the healthcare industry as a medical waste management company. BioWaste began to grow year by year and poured the foundation for EcoWaste. In 2018, Ecowaste launched and has been a pioneer in cannabis waste disposal for licensees in California since the state's legalization of recreational cannabis. 
Present day Ecowaste Solutions is the result of combining the expertise of both companies to provide exceptional, reliable, and trusted waste solutions for regulated industries.

Som oberoende företag är vår målsättning att ständigt förbättra och optimera miljöpåverkan för hyresgästerna. Denna målsättning är viktig för att uppnå en hållbar utveckling där avfall tas om hand på effektivast sätt.

Svenska Servicestyrkan AB grundades år 2000 i Stockholm. Vårt företag har sedan starten arbetat med produktutveckling och olika system inom miljö. Vi har flera års erfarenhet av avfallshantering på ett för miljön hållbart sätt och med den kunskap samt teknik vi har kan alla objekt förbättras.

Vi på Svenska Servicestyrkan lever som vi lär och det heltäckande miljötänkande som genomsyrar vår verksamhet grundläggs i våra medarbetare och partners insikt, kunskap och engagemang i dessa frågor.

Vår främsta målsättning är att skapa en bra förutsättning för kunderna som leder till en hållbar utveckling, för alla ska tjäna på en bättre miljö.

Name: Giordanos Recycling
Description:
The late Joseph Giordano, Sr. was introduced to scrap recycling by his father Rocco, who had started out with a horse and buggy buying and selling scrap metal and rags during the Depression. Joseph started Giordano’s Recycling on Mill Road, the very first business in what is now a highly industrialized area. While working other jobs. In 1948, after much struggle, Joseph finally became a licensed scrap dealer. In the early days materials were bought with either cash or green stamps. It wasn’t long before Joseph purchased his first baler, an old wooden machine that had to be wound by hand and would produce a 150 lb. bale. The business grew steadily and he soon needed help to move forward.

Joseph Giordano, Jr. joined his father to lend a hand, which he then left a teaching career to help buy precious metals and take care of the books and the numbers for his father while helping raise his younger brother with his older sister. As the buisness grew, Brian Giordano joined the company to help stabilize the company’s operations and add software and production techniques, The two brothers, now partners, helped expand and greatly improve the facility over last 65 years combined. Giordano’s Recycling has exploded into the Waste and Recycling industry with a high volume facility, state of the art equipment, and technologically advanced computer systems. Giordano’s Recycling is equipped with shears, trucks, cranes, and Three high production 2-ram balers.

Name: San Diego Brewcycling Collaborative
Description:
Bringing the San Diego Craft Beverage Community together in order to sort, separate, and properly recycle brewery waste to be responsibly processed.

San Diego's first recycling cooperative for the craft brewing industry! In addition to general curbside recyclables, we work to independently divert & ensure recycling of single-stream:
- Film Plastics including Shrink Wrap
- Malt & Grain Bags
- Plastic Beverage Toppers*
- Cardboard
- Aluminum

 *Public drop off for our Plastics to Pavement Recycling Program is available today at participating locations: https://www.google.com/maps/d/u/1/edit?mid=1qrUuTW5JZzHupSid3VSohaSjJQerN6Y&usp=sharing

The plastic beverage toppers collected at our drop off locations will be recycled by MacRebur Southern California into plastic roads, reducing the need for virgin materials to create asphalt while providing an opportunity to divert waste plastic from the landfill. A study conducted at EDCO Escondido’s MRF found that this material more often than not isn’t recognized by machinery, resulting in plastic beverage toppers recycled in local curbside systems typically becoming trash.
Join us in preventing brewery & beverage waste together!

Interested in participating as a brewery or being a drop off location for Plastics to Pavement? Shoot us an email at hello@sdbrewcycling.org to get the ball rolling!

Name: Frixx Container Schoonmaak

Frixx Container Schoonmaak gaat verder dan alleen het schoonmaken van containers met een normaal formaat. Ook de grotere containers waar Gemeentes vaak gebruik van maken kunnen door ons schoongemaakt worden. 
Frixx Container Schoonmaak heeft niet alleen de ervaring maar ook nog eens de juiste apparatuur om Rolcontainers van 40 liter tot maximaal 1600 liter te legen en te wassen. De wasvoertuigen van Frixx zijn voorzien van de Euro 5 norm.


Waarom Frixx Container Schoonmaak?
Naast de wensen van onze klanten, staat bij Frixx Container Schoonmaak het Milieu op de eerste plaats. Dit komt terug in onze hele bedrijfsvoering en dat is direct ons grootste voordeel ten opzichte van de concurrenten. De wijze van reinigen maakt Frixx Container Schoonmaak uniek in Nederland. We zijn helemaal voorbereid op de steeds maar strengere Europese regelgeving waar we het overigens helemaal mee eens zijn.

Name: MISTER RECYCLAGE
Description:
MISTER RECYCLAGE est une entreprise de collecte et recyclage de déchets recyclable, notamment les déchets métalliques
tels que les catalyseurs automobiles. Les catalyseurs automobiles permettent de limiter les émissions polluantes qui sortent
des échappements lorsqu’on roule. Mais, un catalyseur défaillant, des émissions de gaz polluants peuvent provenir du pot
d'échappement. Cela dénote dès lors que le pot catalytique n'est plus en mesure de transformer les substances chimiques pour
les rendre moins nocives. La fumée rejetée peut être assez abondante et être de couleur noire avec une forte odeur. Cette fumée
pollue l’air et émet du gaz à effet de serre qui est très dangereux pour l’atmosphère. Dans le but de lutter contre la pollution
de l’air et le réchauffement climatique, nous, MISTER RECYCLAGE, collectons les catalyseurs usés des véhicules
automobiles et les recyclons sur place, ensuite les exportons à une société partenaire qui évolue dans le recyclage et la
transformation de métaux précieux. Ainsi, les métaux sont traités dans des laboratoires et usines de fabrication de catalyseurs
et de joaillerie etc…

As we move forward, our commitment remains unwavering. We’ll continue to transform spaces, enhance lives, and contribute to the greater good. We invite you to join us on this journey, as together, we create a world where clutter is replaced with clarity, and chaos gives way to creativity.

Name: Avfallskonsulten

Name: Marius Pedersen, a.s. Slovensko
Description:
Marius Pedersen, a.s. so sídlom v Trenčíne je dcérskou spoločnosťou – A/S MARIUS PEDERSEN – najväčšej súkromnej dánskej spoločnosti v oblasti nakladania s odpadmi a na Slovensku sa etablovala ako profesionálna spoločnosť, ktorá poskytuje služby v oblasti odpadového hospodárstva, údržbe komunikácií a starostlivosti o zeleň.

Ako jedna z najväčších spoločností pôsobiacich na slovenskom trhu v oblasti odpadového hospodárstva, poskytuje komplexné služby v oblasti nakladania s odpadom. Jej činnosť sa sústreďuje na zákazníkov z komunálnej i podnikateľskej sféry, na priemyselné podniky i obchodné reťazce.

Skupina Marius Pedersen vykonáva činnosti v oblasti poskytovania služieb pri nakladaní s odpadmi v nasledovných regiónoch Slovenska: Trenčín, Bratislava, Levice, Veľký Krtíš, Pezinok, Šamorín, Piešťany, Nové Mesto nad Váhom, Stará Turá, Nováky, Zvolen, Krupina, Banská Bystrica, Vysoké Tatry, Kežmarok, Poprad, Vranov nad Topľou, Košice, Hlohovec, Sabinov, Nitra, Levice, Nová Baňa, Slovenská Ľupča, Hriňová, Sliač a iné. V uvedených regiónoch aktívne vykonáva zber, prepravu, zneškodňovanie komunálneho odpadu, priemyselných a nebezpečných odpadov v úzkej spolupráci s viac ako 400 mestami a obcami, pričom zabezpečuje tieto služby pre takmer 1 000 000 obyvateľov a približne 4 000 podnikateľských subjektov.

Name: Omni Waste & Recyling
Description:
At Omni Waste & Recycling, we believe that waste management is more than just picking up trash—it’s about providing our customers with reliable, efficient, and timely service. We specialize in residential, commercial, and industrial waste management with an unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction. Our team is dedicated to offering same-day to next-day services, ensuring that your waste is managed on your schedule.

We pride ourselves on delivering personalized, fast, and responsive services. Whether you need regular pickups, emergency waste disposal, or specialized waste handling, Omni Waste & Recycling has the solutions you can trust. Our goal is to make waste management as seamless and convenient as possible, so you can focus on what matters most.

Name: GPD Roll Off

For the past 20 years, we have been a family-owned, premier waste removal and dumpster rental company in Maryland, specializing in apartment community, commercial, and industrial waste services. Your calls are always answered; you won't have to wait for days for someone to get back to you. Any service you need can be scheduled for the following business day. No jobs are too big or too small.

Punctuality is paramount; our crews and fleet of trucks show up on time, every time. We take pride in our work and this is evident by our speed and professionalism. Trash may not be at the top of your mind, so when you call us we make sure it never needs to be.

Name: E-TECH TRADING, LLC
Description: E-TECH TRADING is committed to providing the proper guidance for planet safe electronic disposal. And because we believe all electronic items continue to hold great value after they have been retired,  E-TECH TRADING is dedicated to maximizing their value. We provide a team and a service truck to pick up your valued items. Once secure, we then pride ourselves in finding the best market for reused items and recycle low-valued items with certificated downstream vendors. Name: BGZ Gesellschaft für Zwischenlagerung mbH
Description:
Die BGZ Gesellschaft für Zwischenlagerung mbH ist die deutschlandweite Expertin für die trockene Zwischenlagerung von radioaktivem Abfall. Dazu zählen hochradioaktive Abfälle, wie abgebrannte Brennelemente, aber auch Abfälle aus Betrieb, Stilllegung und Rückbau der Kernkraftwerke. Die Sicherheit von Mensch und Natur zu gewährleisten ist unser erklärtes Ziel.

Mehr als 600 Mitarbeiter*innen kümmern sich an 19 Standorten in Deutschland um die fachgerechte sichere Zwischenlagerung der schwach-, mittel- und hochradioaktiven Abfälle, bis Endlager bereitstehen. 

Dies ist eine einzigartige Aufgabe. Für unsere Zwischenlager- und die beiden Verwaltungsstandorte in Essen und Berlin suchen wir regelmäßig engagierte Kolleg*innen, die uns hierbei unterstützen. Wünschen Sie sich eine sinnvolle und verantwortungsvolle Tätigkeit, die Sie beruflich und persönlich weiterbringt? Dann bewerben Sie sich jetzt und werden Teil eines wachsenden Teams in einem jungen Unternehmen!

Name: CIPROVIS
Description:
Ciprovis est une start-up qui a vu le jour dans un contexte où les défis environnementaux se retrouvent au centre des discussions internationales, ces problèmes devant être résolus à petite échelle CIPROVIS se présente comme étant la solution au Senegal en intervenant sur trois axes, notamment : 
 • L’Education environnementale 
 • La gestion des ordures 
 • Le Tri et le recyclage  

Notre mission est d’apporter une solution optimale à la gestion des déchets au Sénégal en collectant, triant et recyclant les déchets afin de réduire leur impact sur notre environnement. Notre particularité provient de l’utilisation de tricycles motorisés qui nous permet ainsi de proposer facilement nos services dans les endroits les plus difficile d’accès (rues étroites ou en mauvaises états ).

Nous avons une approche globale de la gestion des déchets et mettons en place des actions de sensibilisations sur l’importance du tri et du recyclage 

Ciprovis est la première entreprise au Sénégal à intervenir sur toute la chaine à savoir : Sensibilisation, Collecte et Recyclage. 

Au delà de la gestion des déchets, nous créons des emplois pour les jeunes : les agents de prospection, de tri, les artisants en charge de redonner une nouvelle vie aux matériaux récupérés et recyclables. L’économie circulaire ça nous connait.
Au cours des 5 dernières années, nous avons développé une expertise dans le secteur ce qui fait de nous le partenaire idéal

Name: North West Recycling Ltd
Description:
Cumbria’s greener waste partner, providing cost effective & reliable waste management services (including skip and trade waste bin hire) to our domestic and commercial customers, and ensuring your business waste is disposed of in a responsible and sustainable manner through our recycling processes and the creation of renewable fuel.

Founded in 1995 as Brampton Skip Hire, North West Recycling are a family-owned business which has continuously expanded to become the region’s largest privately owned waste management provider, servicing Cumbria, South West Scotland and Northumberland.

We now deliver fully integrated and environmentally friendly waste solutions for both domestic and commercial customers, with a fleet of 40 vehicles and over 2000 skips & containers, all delivered from a 16-acre purpose-built recycling facility near Carlisle.

From waste collection & skip hire, recycling and now to production of high-quality fuel pellets from local waste, we’re committed to reducing co2. emissions and minimising landfill for Cumbria.

Employing over 130 people, we really care for and take great pride in our staff and our Cumbrian heritage, and always aim to give back to the local community.

If you'd like any information about how we can help minimise both your waste costs and your environmental impact, or for one of our sales team to pop down and complete a site visit and waste audit, please call 01228 672999, or visit our website.

Working at Granger isn’t about a short-term job; it’s about long-term careers that will benefit associates, their families and our company.

Name: ELISE Atlantique
Description:
ACTES ELISE atlantique est une entreprise adaptée de 57 salariés, dont 42 salariés en situation de handicap et/ou en difficulté d’insertion socio-professionnelle.

Depuis sa création en 2012, ACTES a pour conviction de mettre les innovations sociales et technologiques au service d’une économie circulaire. Dans le fonctionnement de ses services, l’entreprise intervient sur trois (3) volets qui sont le fondement de ses valeurs à savoir : le social, l’environnement et l’économie. 

ACTES met en œuvre un écosystème qui répond aux attentes de la responsabilité civile. L’entreprise procède à la création du lien social et conçoit un circuit positif d’insertion sociale à travers la création d’emploi pour lutter contre l’exclusion sociale des personnes éloignées de l’emploi et en difficulté d’insertion. 
L’entreprise mène également des actions de sensibilisation auprès des utilisateurs dans une dynamique de conduite au changement et à la consommation responsable.  

L’essence de ACTES repose sur le développement durable et le respect de l’environnement à travers la valorisation des matières. Franchisée ELISE, ses services portent sur une offre complète de collecte et de traitement des déchets de bureau pour les organisations privées et publiques de toute taille. La prestation de service permet le traitement et le recyclage des déchets. Elle défend un système de prévention de la pollution due à l’incinération et l’enfouissement des déchets avec une garantie BAS CARBONE. 

ACTES est ancrée dans un processus économique innovant et de gouvernance particulière. L’implantation de activités de ACTES sur d’autres zones géographiques sert une volonté de développement économique de la région Aquitaine dans l’intérêt des collectivités et des opportunités locales. L’entreprise donne la priorité à la création et le développement de nouveaux marchés, à travers des innovations de procédés, la création de service créatrice d’emploi et la création de richesse.

Name: ECOWRAP
Description:
ECOWRAP | Transforming Waste Management with Technology & Sustainability 

ECOWRAP is a tech-driven waste management company committed to building a Zero-Dump ecosystem through AI-powered tracking, efficient source segregation, and a robust reverse supply chain. Our innovative model ensures that waste is not just collected but scientifically processed and recovered, eliminating landfill dependency.  

Key Highlights:  
 Tech-Enabled Waste Management – AI & GPS-based tracking for real-time monitoring  
 Zero Dump Concept – Diverting waste from landfills through recycling & co-processing  
 Source Segregation Expertise – 3-degree waste segregation at the household level  
 Sustainable Reverse Supply Chain – Ensuring high-value recyclables reach the right processors  
 Data-Driven Approach – Leveraging analytics to optimize waste collection & forecasting  

Currently, ECOWRAP serves 50,000+ residents and 1,200+ commercial enterprises, handling over 200 metric tons of waste per month in a segregated manner. Our partnerships with municipal bodies, corporates, and recyclers enable us to scale our impact and make cities cleaner, greener, and more sustainable.  

Join us in revolutionizing waste management!  
#ZeroDump #SustainableCities #AIforWasteManagement

Name: Oscar Circulair
Description:
Oscar maakt steden afvalvrij!
Het doel van Oscar is de restafvalstroom te reduceren, hoogwaardige grondstoffenstromen te bundelen voor hergebruik en de leefbaarheid van een gebied te vergroten door het beperken van (vervuilende) vervoersbewegingen.
Met een klein en duurzaam voertuig haalt Oscar zeven dagen per week de afval- en de grondstoffen persoonlijk bij alle deelnemers op. Hierbij werken we onder andere met mensen met een afstand tot de arbeidsmarkt.  Afval- en grondstoffen worden vervoerd naar een hub in het gebied. Op de hub worden waardestromen en restafval gebundeld en, indien mogelijk, geperst om vanuit daar de stad uit vervoerd te worden naar verwerkers die de grondstoffen terug in het productieproces brengen.

Name: Jangjo Indonesia
Description: Jangjo is a a forward-thinking waste management company, dedicated to providing end-to-end solutions and innovations that set new standards in the industry. We are committed to transforming waste management through sustainable practices that benefit both the environment and society.

Name: Avri
Description:
Avri houdt zich bezig met duurzame inzameling van afval en grondstoffen en efficiënt onderhoud van de publieke ruimte in de regio Rivierenland. Handhaving, Beleid & Advies en Bedrijfsafval zijn eveneens werkzaamheden van Avri. ‘Samen werken aan een schoon Rivierenland’ is het bedrijfsmotto.
Avri is een overheidsbedrijf en een samenwerkingsverband van 10 gemeenten:  Buren, Culemborg, Geldermalsen, Lingewaal, Maasdriel, Neder-Betuwe, Neerijnen, Tiel, West Maas en Waal en Zaltbommel. 

Grondstoffenpark
Het Grondstoffenpark is een uniek initiatief dat een belangrijke bijdrage wil leveren aan hergebruik van grondstoffen. In het park op het terrein van Avri in Geldermalsen, komen afvalstromen van overheidsinstellingen, bedrijven en inwoners samen en worden ze omgezet in grondstoffen voor nieuwe producten. 
De bedrijven Bruins & Kwast en Afvalzorg zijn de eerste bedrijven op het Grondstoffenpark die samen met Avri een impuls willen geven aan de ‘circulaire economie’. Dit is de economie van de toekomst, waarin zo min mogelijk grondstoffen verloren moeten.
Het Grondstoffenpark is het eerste recyclingsbedrijventerrein in de regio waar meerdere bedrijven op bepaalde afvalstromen samenwerken en gezamenlijk gebruik maken van aanwezige voorzieningen zoals weegbrug, overslaghal, beveiliging, kantoorruimte, e.d. Op het terrein is nog ruimte over, dus andere bedrijven die passen binnen de duurzame filosofie van het park, zijn welkom.

Name: NSR AB
Description: NSR and its partners handles almost 3 million empties of waste containers every year. But our mission does not only include managing waste and recycling – our assignment is to drive development forward and work to prevent waste. The company is owned by six municipalities in the south of Sweden. The region has a total population of approximately 266,000. Including partners in the industrial park, we are more than 300 committed employees who work for a more sustainable society.

Name: SO Recycle Ltd
Description:
SO Recycle is the UK's fastest growing specialist buyer of waste paper, card and confidential waste. You can deliver to our 7 acre site in Andover, or we can collect Nationwide.

We pride ourselves on our great customer service, fast response times and cheerful customer service staff and truck drivers, as well as rapid payment terms.

Our promises are backed up by ISO9001 and BSEN15713 accreditations, for your peace of mind.

We also offer confidential waste destruction service, from as low as £1.98/sack including collection and destruction, these can be brought from our website. We can also offer archive clearances from one sack to 25ton loads, as well as cabinets on a regular service across the south and London.

Name: Lyco
Description:
Independently owned glass recycling company offering glass collections across the UK. With great industry knowledge our warm and welcoming team can provide you with a tailor made, sustainable, environmentally friendly, zero to landfill waste solution. 

Lyco and its employees have a genuine passion for recycling and sustainability which is reflected in our Quality, Environmental and Carbon Reduction policies. We do and always will strive to better ourselves to find new and innovative ways to be more sustainable for us as a company, for us as individuals and for you the customer.

Our other big passion is our customers! For more information and help on increasing your recycling levels and saving money on your waste disposal please contact us by emailing services@lycorecycling.com.
We look forward to hearing from you!

Name: UK Deposit Management Organisation
Description: UK Deposit Management Organisation Ltd (UK DMO) is the official operator of the Deposit Return Scheme for single-use plastic and metal drinks containers in England, Northern Ireland and Scotland. Name: Ecube Labs Co., Ltd.
Description:
Ecube Labs is a provider of smart waste management and logistics solutions. Our integrated line of products includes solar-powered waste compacting bins (CleanCUBE), ultrasonic fill-level sensors (CleanFLEX) that can be fitted to any type of container, and a data analytic cloud platform (CleanCityNetworks).

Ecube Labs helps cities and waste collection organizations reduce operational costs by eliminating unnecessary pick-ups and helping optimize collection routes and schedules. This leads to less traffic congestion, fuel emissions and noise pollution from collection trucks. Our solutions also improve public cleanliness and health by minimizing waste overflow and pests.

As one of the top IoT waste management and logistics companies in Asia, we have continued to invest highly in R&D, global expansion and most importantly, our people. Ecube Labs is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea but our products and services can be seen all over the world.

Name: Sharp Group
Description: Sharp Group is a friendly and reliable waste management service operating in and around the London, Essex and Kent areas. We provide four main services - skip hire, roll-on-off container hire, grab loader hire, and tradewaste services- and, with over 40 years of experience in the field, we are one of the most trusted and reliable companies in the sector. We are dedicated to offering same-day services, with modern vehicles and friendly and professional staff. We would love to chat about what we could do for you, get in touch today!

Name: OURRY
Description:
OURRY est une PME familiale et indépendante : cela fait partie de notre ADN et nous en sommes fiers. C’est la raison pour laquelle nous mettons un point d’honneur à servir tous nos clients collectivités locales et industriels avec le même niveau d’exigence, de qualité de service, de réactivité et de pragmatisme opérationnel.

Nous travaillons dans les métiers de l’environnement depuis plus de 40 ans : la collecte sélective CS des emballages, des ordures ménagères OM, du verre, des déchets verts et des encombrants mais aussi la gestion de déchèteries et de centres de tri et de transfert, le nettoiement urbain, le transport de gros volumes (en camion remorque et FMA) et plus généralement dans les métiers du tri, du recyclage et la valorisation des déchets où nous ne cessons d’innover.

Nous sommes aujourd’hui 400 collaborateurs, implantés dans 6 régions de France avec 15 établissements et réalisons un chiffre d’affaires de 45M€. Conscient que nos métiers sont au cœur de la transition écologique et que les objectifs européens et français sont très ambitieux, nous poursuivons notre croissance de manière pérenne dans toutes ces activités et nous développons notre présence sur les territoires pour être toujours au plus proche de nos clients.

Name: FOOTT
Description:
FOOTT is a leading regional waste, recycling and events solutions company. 

Australian owned and regionally based in Victoria, FOOTT operates one of the largest regional recycling and processing facilities in the state.

FOOTT also operates four receiving depots for Victoria's Container Deposit Scheme (CDS Vic) in regional Victoria - Shepparton East, Benalla, Yarrawonga and Cobram.

FOOTT also provides event quality toilet and waste services for all types of large and small events in Victoria and southern NSW.

If you'd like to know more about how FOOTT can help you with your waste and recycling requirements, or event requirements, call our friendly team 
on 1300 236 688.

Nous comptons aujourd'hui 60 collaborateurs et +1000 clients publics Administrations (Ademe, Crous, Sénat, Assemblée Nationale), Collectivités (Paris, Rennes, Bordeaux, Est Ensemble, Grenoble, Lyon, Lorient, Clermont), Syndicats (Syctom, Sivalor, Trivalis, Siredom, Sigidurs, Smicval, Smitom Lombric, Sittommi), +250 clients privés Eco Organismes (Citeo, Ecologic), Opérateurs (Derichebourg, Nicollin, Paprec, Pizzorno, Sepur, Suez, Veolia), Loisirs (Disneyland, Parc Astérix, Club Med) et Restauration (Compass, Crous, Sodexo).

Nous sommes experts des Etude de gisements de dechets (Caractérisations, Modecom, Tri à la source des biodéchets), de la Prévention des déchets (Plpdma, Sensibilisation, Audit déchets, Audit gaspillage alimentaire), Optimisation de la collecte (Réseaux, Moyens, Fréquence et Dispositifs), Financement des services (Tarification Incitative et Redevance Spéciale) et Amo marché (Conteneurisation, Collecte et Traitement).

Contactez-nous ici : 
contact@verdicite.fr 01 56 93 36 56

Name: Baker Commodities Inc.
Description:
Baker Commodities Inc. has been one of the nation’s leading providers of rendering and grease removal services since 1937.

Baker is a completely sustainable company, recycling animal by-products and used cooking oil into valuable products that can be used to feed livestock, power vehicles, and act as a base for everyday items.

Our network of more than 21 facilities across the United States converts animal by-products into commercial commodities such as high-protein ingredients for poultry feed and pet food, and tallow, a valuable ingredient in soaps, paints, cosmetics, and more. Our facilities also convert used cooking oil into “yellow grease,” a key ingredient in biodiesel fuels.

Baker is committed to saving the environment by finding sustainable ways to support the food production and restaurant industries. Our commitment to “Quality and Pride…Worldwide” ensures our customers receive the highest quality of finished products and services!

Baker Commodities Inc, offers services in rendering, restaurant grease collection, jetting and fat and bone collection.

Name: Sikle - Les Composteurs de Strasbourg
Description:
SIKLE collecte à vélo les déchets alimentaires des professionnels à Strasbourg.

Trier à la source, collecter à vélo et produire un compost 100% Strasbourg, voilà notre participation au cycle de la matière organique. Enrichir les sols urbains grâce au compost en misant sur une logistique à faibles émissions, c'est s'engager pour un air meilleur et une ville fertile.

Le service se destine à tous les producteurs de biodéchets professionnels : restaurants, hôtels, bars et cafés, boulangeries, fleuristes, grandes et moyennes surfaces, cantines scolaires, centres commerciaux, etc.

Il est adapté aux besoins et aux contraintes spécifiques des professionnels, tout en répondant aux enjeux environnementaux et sociétaux actuels : sobriété énergétique, soutien de l'agriculture urbaine et relocalisation de la gestion des déchets.

Name: Reinigingsdiensten Rd4
Description:
Wij maken de wereld gewoon een beetje mooier
Voor de 10 gemeenten Beekdaelen, Brunssum, Eijsden-Margraten, Gulpen-Wittem, Heerlen, Kerkrade, Landgraaf, Simpelveld, Vaals en Voerendaal verzorgt Rd4 de inzameling en verwerking van afval en grondstoffen. We beheren 8 milieuparken en verzorgen verschillende sorteer- en kringloopactiviteiten. Verder adviseert Rd4 de gemeenten bij hun afval- en grondstoffenbeleid en verzorgt Rd4 de omgevingscommunicatie naar 145.000 huishoudens. Daarnaast verzorgen we de straatreiniging, onkruidbeheersing en gladheidbestrijding.

Samen steeds slimmer
Elke dag zetten wij ons in voor een mooie en schone leefomgeving. Samen met burgers, overheden, bedrijven en instellingen zoeken we constant naar slimme en duurzame oplossingen om afval te verminderen, grondstoffen te scheiden, spullen een tweede leven te geven en mensen kansen te bieden. Alleen zo worden we samen steeds slimmer.

Onze drie kernwaarden:
Samenwerken
We werken samen, iedere dag met veel plezier en energie. Onze veelzijdige werkzaamheden verbinden ons met elkaar en met onze omgeving. Wij streven naar een omgeving waarin we elkaar helpen.

Slagvaardig
We zijn slagvaardig, iedere dag dagen we elkaar uit. Wij doen ons uiterste best om onze werkzaamheden uit te voeren. Wat we beloven maken we waar.

Vooruitstrevend
We zijn vooruitstrevend, iedere dag verbeteren we elkaar. Bij alles wat we doen, stellen we de vraag hoe het beter kan. We geven elkaar de ruimte om uit te blinken.

Name: Walsh Waste & Recycling
Description:
Walsh Waste is one of Ireland’s longest established and most experienced waste management companies, having celebrated 50 years in business in 2022. We are a Galway-based family-owned and managed company providing waste management services across diverse business sectors. This includes the cleaning and decontamination of tanks and vessels, CCTV drain surveys, commercial waste collection, skip hire, and hire a loo services. 

With continuous investment in our equipment and personnel, we are focused on delivering superior customer service and offer you the opportunity to deal with your waste streams efficiently through reputable and ecologically sound processes.

Walsh Waste is certified ISO 9001 Quality Management, ISO 14001 Environmental Management and ISO 45001 Occupational Health & Safety Management. 

We have ambitious sustainability 2030 targets that are based on existing technology and realistic deployment. This deliverable strategy builds the foundations for the next phase of our long-term ambition of reaching net-zero emissions across our direct operations by no later than 2050.

Highlights include:

•	50% reduction in CO2 emissions
•	20% increase in collection route efficiency
•	All cars and vans to be Electric Vehicles
•	Plant 50,000 trees to offset CO2 produced as a result of operations
•	Buy 100% renewable electricity
•	Develop our renewable energy capability (solar panels on roofs of company buildings)
