Name: Circulai
Description:
Welcome to Circulai, we are on a mission to redefine waste management and ignite a revolution. 

Founded by industry experts Max Kanda and Simon Sharp, formerly the Managing Directors of Novati and Greenzone, alongside strategic leader Dave Swallow, Circulai is more than just a waste management company. We are focused on transforming how waste is treated, and creating a cleaner, greener future. 

At Circulai, we don't just see waste as something to manage, we see it as an opportunity to rethink our relationship with the planet. Our goal is to challenge traditional methods and drive real, sustainable change. 

With our team of passionate innovators, we are using AI and data analytics to revolutionise waste management, enhance education and transform waste into a valuable resource. 

Join us on our mission to redefine the waste industry, contact us today!

Name: Nofir
Description:
Nofir - Bringing value to marine waste

Nofir is a Norwegian company, which collects and recycles discarded equipment from fishing and fish farming. Collected material is transported to the factory in Lithuania where equipment is dismantled and prepared for recycling. In this way the company not only prevent fishing nets from going to the seas but also helps in creating new, valuable products like clothes, furniture, carpets, and others. 

Nofir was founded in 2008 with the purpose of establishing a nationwide system for collecting discarded fishing and fish farming equipment in Norway. 15 000 tons of plastic equipment from the fishing and fish farming industry is discarded each year in Norway. In 2012 Nofir were granted support from European Union through the Eco Innovation scheme. Since then we have collected material all over Europe.

Nofir is collecting equipment from waste facilities, net lofts, fishing vessels, ports and other places all over Europe. This provides all actors the possibility of using Nofir regardless of quantities and location. The waste owners are only responsible to load the trucks we send. Nofir takes care of all other work, including paperwork.

We take great pride in our work which helps keep our planet clean. Our work reduces plastic in the sea, plastic on landfills, decrease oil consumption and decrease the CO2 emission. As a rule of thumb one kg recycled plastic equals two kg of reduced CO2 emissions. Marine waste are now turned into new products – instead of being an environmental problem it is now a resource.

CE QUI NE VOUS SERT PLUS PEUT SERVIR À D’AUTRES !

Our cardboard box reuse scheme offers substantially higher rebates than the traditional baling and recycling route, while drastically reducing carbon emissions, energy usage, waste and natural resources.

Description:
Asya Entegre Atık Yönetimi San. Ve Tic. A.Ş. kurum ve şahıslardan arşiv, kitap vb. hurda kağıtları toplamak ve bunları tekrar ekonomiye kazandırmak hizmetlerini sunmak amacıyla, 2005 yılında şahıs firması olarak kurulmuş ve 2019 yılında Firma A.Ş ’ye dönüştürülmüştür. Zonguldak merkezli firma bünyesinde 2 adet çağrı merkezi ve Sakarya Adapazarı’nda 5.000 m2 kapalı alana sahip toplama ve ayırma tesisinde faaliyetini sürdürmektedir. 

Bununla birlikte bu yıl sürdürülebilirlikten aldığı ilham ile, Türkiye'de bir ilk olan tek seferde 6 ton kağıt imha kapasitesi bulunan bir mobil imha aracı ve güvenli evrak saklama dolapları, İMHATR ismi ile hizmete sunulmuştur.

Funkcjonujemy od 2004 roku i obecnie posiadamy trzy nowoczesne zakłady produkcyjne, których zdolności przetwórcze wynoszą 140 tys. ton opon. Dysponujemy unikatową ogólnopolską siecią zbiórki opon, złożoną z kilku tys. punktów odbioru i jesteśmy obecni na wielu rynkach europejskich, w tym na Litwie poprzez naszą spółkę zależną APG. 

Grupa Recykl oferuje kompleksową portfolio produktów (czyste granulaty SBR, paliwa alternatywne, kord stalowy, puder gumowy, SMAPOL) i usług (usługi recyklingu i odzysku, rozliczenia opłaty produktowej) dla najbardziej wymagających Klientów z szeregu branż.

Osią naszego długoterminowego rozwoju są innowacyjne rozwiązania i technologie, których komercjalizację wspierają nowoczesne zakłady produkcyjne. 

Grupa Recykl od 2011 roku jest spółką publiczną notowaną na rynku NewConnect Giełdy Papierów Wartościowych w Warszawie.

Name: Scrapbuddy
Description:
SCRAPBUDDY is an innovative tech platform that aims to improve the traditional unorganized kabadiwala system.

Here's a bitter fact:

"India generates 62 million tonnes of municipal solid waste (MSW) annually. Out of the 43 million tonnes of MSW collected, about 31 million tonnes end up in landfills while only 12 million tonnes undergo treatment."

But why does almost 75% of collected waste end up in landfills?

The answer is simple — We're failing to segregate waste at ground level.

But the story doesn't end here. According to Bloomberg, Indian landfills comprise 60% organic waste. This organic waste, in landfills, undergoes anaerobic reaction and produces Methane gas (CH4), which is the second largest Greenhouse Gas and 25 times more potent than Carbon dioxide (CO2). On March 22, 2022, the Ghazipur dump leaked an estimated 2.17 metric tonnes of methane in an hour.

Scary, isn't it?

To fight this mounting garbage problem, you need a capable buddy. And that's where we come into picture.

SCRAPBUDDY aims to eradicate this problem by promoting the segregation of waste at source. We do this by organizing the traditional kabadiwala system with our tech capabilities, and rewarding our customers with cash for their trash. This way we not only minimize the GHG emissions, but also contribute to the circular economy by recycling the waste collected.

So join us in our fight against this mounting garbage problem. Follow our official channels!

Coleta e transporte de resíduos comuns, recicláveis e perigosos (Classe I e II)

 Diferenciais competitivos:

Atuação em todo o Brasil, com frota própria e equipes locais

Operações padronizadas com EPIs, caçambas identificadas e sinalização correta

Sistema de gestão inteligente com relatórios auditáveis e dashboards

Atendimento técnico consultivo com foco em sustentabilidade corporativa, ESG e metas de ISO 14001

Projetos de Aterro Zero, redução de emissões e créditos de carbono

Na N4 Group, unimos tecnologia, sustentabilidade e performance ambiental. Nossa missão é cuidar dos resíduos do seu negócio com inteligência, transparência e responsabilidade.

 Our new upgraded system is designed in such a way to bring people closer to the government, connect people digitally with local government and to contribute to solve local issues like waste management and grab different schemes and benefits to the common public issued by the government. Name: Ciclo Limpo
Description:
O Ciclo Limpo é uma solução prática, sustentável e transparente para pessoas e estabelecimentos comerciais que desejam ser parte efetiva da preservação do meio ambiente. Para isso, transformamos resíduos orgânicos em adubo, de uma forma simples e sem esforço para as pessoas, informando os impactos positivos que alcançamos juntos!
Conheça mais detalhes de como funciona:
• Coleta: Cada domicílio recebe 1 balde de 18 L com tampa e 1 saco de bioplástico compostável de 40 L, para armazenar seus resíduos até a data da coleta: quinzenal ou semanal (1 vez por semana)*.
• No dia e horário da coleta, a serem combinados com o(a) morador(a), o saco de bioplástico compostável é colocado para fora e o coletor retira o saco cheio e deixa outro novo saco no local.
* No caso das escolas, restaurantes, empresas, estabelecimentos comerciais e outros grandes geradores, utilizamos bombonas plásticas nas coletas (que dispensam o uso de sacos de bioplástico compostável pois trocamos as bombonas cheias de resíduos orgânicos por outras vazias e higienizadas). Nestes locais, a quantidade de coletas por semana varia de acordo com o estabelecimento e a sua geração de resíduos orgânicos.
• Compostagem: A compostagem dos resíduos orgânicos é feita em local adequado, transformando estes resíduos em adubo. O Pátio de Compostagem do Ciclo Limpo localiza-se dentro do Campus do Lageado da UNESP de Botucatu.
• Relatório mensal de impactos positivos: Os resíduos orgânicos são pesados a cada coleta realizada e cada cliente recebe mensalmente um relatório com a quantidade coletada e os impactos positivos gerados.
• Recompensa mensal (brindes): Cada cliente recebe também, a cada mês, uma muda de hortaliça ou tempero, ou 1 kg de adubo, à sua escolha.
• Investimento: Para o funcionamento do serviço, cada cliente faz um investimento mensal, no formato de uma assinatura.
Além dos planos de coleta também vendemos o composto orgânico, um adubo de altíssima qualidade agronômica, e a cobertura de solo.

We are committed to minimizing the environmental impact of battery waste while harnessing the potential of battery recycling to drive positive change. With a passion for innovation, environmental stewardship, and community engagement, Focus Waste Management is your partner in sustainable waste management solutions.

Mission:
At Focus Waste Management, our mission is clear: to pave the way for a cleaner and more sustainable world by providing cutting-edge battery recycling services. We strive to transform battery waste into valuable resources while raising awareness about the importance of responsible waste management practices. Our ultimate goal is to contribute to a circular economy where resources are conserved, and our planet thrives.

Vision:
Our vision is to be a global leader in battery waste management, known for our innovative recycling technologies, unwavering commitment to environmental protection, and our role in building a future where waste is seen as an opportunity, not a problem.

Products and Services:

Battery Recycling:
Our core service revolves around the responsible recycling of batteries, ranging from small household batteries to industrial-scale batteries used in various applications. We utilize state-of-the-art recycling technologies to extract valuable materials such as lithium, cobalt, nickel, and more from used batteries. By doing so, we reduce the demand for virgin materials, decrease the environmental footprint of battery production, and prevent harmful substances from entering our ecosystem.

OnSite Metals began in 2004 with just a single small cube truck, collecting scrap metal from a few suppliers. Since then, the company has grown and now operates a fleet of 15 trucks of various sizes across three sites in the province.

In 2011, OnSite was one of the co-founders of Les Entrepôts de Métaux, a metal recycling facility that introduced one of the first shredders of its kind on the South Shore of Montreal. Since 2019, OnSite has merged with Les Entrepôts de Métaux, further strengthening its role as a key player in the recycling industry in Quebec.

Continuing its expansion, OnSite opened its doors in the Quebec City region in 2015, with additional developments planned in the near future.

-les professionnels du bâtiment : frigoristes, climaticiens, chauffagistes, plombiers, techniciens CVC, entreprises de maintenance,

-les collectivités territoriales et établissements publics,
dans la récupération, le traitement et la valorisation de ces déchets techniques.

Ces équipements contiennent des substances dangereuses (fluides frigorigènes, huiles…) qui nécessitent une prise en charge réglementée, traçable et responsable.Or, ils sont trop souvent stockés, abandonnés ou évacués hors des filières agréées.

Notre solution gratuite et clé en main comprend :
 Collecte sur site ou en dépôt
 Extraction des fluides frigorigènes
 Dépollution des composants
 Gestion des BSD, Trackdéchets & CERFA
 Valorisation des matières premières (métaux, plastiques, fluides)

Nous garantissons un traitement conforme dans des filières agréées, au service d’une économie circulaire décarbonée.

 Intervention sur toute la région Occitanie.

Many of our competitors bring every trailer or dumpster directly to the landfill because it’s the easiest and quickest option. When shopping around for the right company, be sure to ask about their environmental efforts so you can feel confident in where your unwanted items are going.

Name: Copackers Recycling Limited
Description:
Our mission at Copackers Recycling is to create a sustainable environment by tackling Africa’s waste problem, one bottle at a time, starting with Nigeria and its neighboring countries.

We want to reduce the negative impact of waste products on our environment by recovering, collecting, transporting, sorting, crushing, packing and distributing these materials to local and international producers for reuse.

Our overall aim is to promote a circular economy by diverting trash from landfills to be recycled and repurposed for more sustainable and eco-friendly products.

We are in the process of setting up a Materials Recovery Facility (MRF) that will retrieve 2000 tonnes of commingled waste daily.

Our facility will collect a single stream of plastic waste (PET, HDPE, LDPE, PP, PVC), aluminium, organic, paper and E-waste.

They will be pre-screened and sorted using a combination of manual and automated processes. After which, they will be crushed and baled for reuse by our local and international manufacturing partners.

Our long term goal is to ensure our MRF is fully optimized to bolster our community’s commitment to achieving zero waste and contributing to the circular economy.

Name: Sustainable Africa Solutions Ltd
Description:
Company Overview:
Sustainable Africa Solutions actively addresses the significant challenge of food waste in Nigeria urban markets by implementing a circular economy biogas model. We have established a sustainable system that transforms organic waste from food vendors, market stalls, and street food sellers into a valuable resource, effectively mitigating environmental and public health risks associated with food waste.

 Vision 
To transform urban food waste into clean, affordable energy—creating sustainable cities where vendors thrive, pollution declines, and communities benefit from a circular green economy.

 Mission 
We empower food vendors by converting their organic waste into biogas for clean cooking—saving them money, reducing environmental harm, and building a waste-free future through scalable pay-per-use energy solutions.

Core Principles Behind Our Mission: 
1. Sustainability – Turn waste into value, cutting methane emissions and deforestation.  
2. Affordability – Provide affordable biogas
3. Partnership – Work with vendors, governments, and green investors for scalable impact.  
4. Innovation – Use smart metering & waste-to-energy tech for efficiency.  
5. Health & Safety – Reduce smoke pollution and landfill-related diseases.  

 OUR SERVICE:
1. We collect your food scraps for FREE (no more waste disposal hassles!).  
2. We turn waste into clean biogas at our plant.  
3. You buy the gas back for cooking—cheaper than LPG

Our Services

Residential Waste Collection: Tailored for private residences, our reliable and timely waste collection services ensure that your household waste is managed with utmost care and professionalism.
Commercial Waste Management: We offer customized waste management solutions for businesses of all sizes, helping you maintain a clean and eco-friendly workspace.

Recycling Programs: Our recycling initiatives aim to reduce waste and promote the reuse of materials, contributing to environmental sustainability.

Special Waste Disposal: We handle the safe and compliant disposal of hazardous and special waste, protecting your health and the environment.

Why Choose Us?

Environmentally Conscious: Our operations are designed to minimize environmental impact, supporting local sustainability efforts.

Community-Focused: As a locally owned company, we are committed to serving and improving our community.

Reliable Service: With a team of dedicated professionals, we ensure consistent and dependable waste management services.

Join Us in Making a Difference

At Waste PH, we believe that a clean environment is a shared responsibility. Partner with us to make, Cebu and the Philippines a cleaner and greener places to live. Contact us today to learn more about our services and how we can help you manage your waste effectively.

Name: Youcan - Make things happen
Description:
Air pollution, soil contamination, water pollution, loss of natural resources, and increased greenhouse gas emissions from exposed landfills are contributing significantly to climate change and are major issues affecting our planet. This problem is particularly acute in developing nations, where proper waste management remains a critical challenge. Furthermore, the rise of AI and automation poses potential job displacement in certain sectors. A key contributing factor is the lack of awareness and education about effective waste disposal practices, leading to the contamination of air, water, and soil. Addressing these issues requires a concerted effort to educate communities and implement sustainable waste management solutions to protect our environment and future well-being. 

The company has developed an innovative mobile application that serves as a dynamic platform for buying and selling segregated waste directly from the source. This system not only facilitates and encourages waste segregation among users but also ensures the supply of clean, uncontaminated waste to collectors and recycling companies. The project aims to streamline waste segregation, enhance recycling rates, and optimize collection processes, thereby contributing to sustainable waste management practices. This initiative seeks to maximize material recovery and promote biogas production, paving the way for a more sustainable and efficient waste management ecosystem.

Reduce environmental waste impact, mitigate climate change, and create jobs while becoming a leader in waste management solutions. We achieve this by harnessing stakeholder strengths to develop high-quality, AI-powered, scalable software services for innovative waste management and maximizing material recovery at the source. Our AI solutions will not only enhance efficiency but also create opportunities for both skilled and unskilled workers, driving sustainable progress across the waste management sector.

Name: SmartEco Waste Management
Description:
Smarteco Waste Management Pvt. Ltd. is a structured plastic waste management company focused on collection, segregation, processing, and recovery of plastic waste, enabling circular supply chains for sustainable manufacturing.

We work closely with brands, OEMs, recyclers, and producer responsibility partners to ensure responsible handling of post-consumer and post-industrial plastic waste, with strong emphasis on traceability, quality segregation, and compliance.

Our operations are designed to bridge the gap between waste generation and high-quality recycling by delivering:
1. Organised plastic waste collection networks.
2. Material segregation and grading as per recycling requirements.
3. Size reduction (grinding) for downstream recyclers and compounders.
4. Support for circular economy and EPR-aligned supply chains.

With a focus on process discipline, transparency, and sustainability, SmartEco aims to transform plastic waste from an environmental challenge into a valuable resource for the recycling ecosystem.

Smarteco = Smart Waste. Responsible Future.

Name: CoproGreen
Description:
COPROGREEN – LE COMPOST, CLÉ EN MAIN POUR LES COPROPRIÉTÉS 

La loi AGEC impose désormais le tri des biodéchets. Pourtant, en copropriété, les solutions actuelles ne fonctionnent pas :
 Trop contraignantes : descendre au composteur éloigné décourage le tri.
 Mal adaptées : manque d’entretien, nuisances, confusion sur l’usage.
 Faible engagement des résidents faute d’accompagnement.

 COPROGREEN révolutionne le compostage en copropriété !

 NOTRE SOLUTION : SIMPLIFIER ET AUTOMATISER LE TRI

 Installation de bacs à proximité immédiate des vide-ordures pour un accès facile.
 Gestion complète : nettoyage, entretien, remplacement si nécessaire.
 Accompagnement des résidents : sensibilisation, formation et suivi.
 Recyclage des piles inclus : chaque copro bénéficie d’un bac à piles offert pour lutter contre leur pollution.

 NOTRE DIFFÉRENCE : UN SERVICE CLÉ EN MAIN ET 100% EFFICACE

 Jusqu’à 30% de déchets en moins et une réduction des coûts de gestion des ordures ménagères.
 Un compost valorisé pour enrichir les sols locaux, offert aux collectivités et agriculteurs.
 Une alternative concrète pour répondre aux obligations légales sans effort.

 NOTRE AMBITION : FAIRE DU COMPOST UN RÉFLEXE AUTOMATIQUE

 Déployer CoproGreen à grande échelle et faciliter l’adoption du compostage en copropriété.
 Équiper 500 copropriétés d’ici 2027 et sensibiliser des milliers d’habitants à un tri efficace.

 Vous êtes syndic, collectivité ou copropriétaire engagé ?
 Contactez-nous dès aujourd’hui pour une étude gratuite et personnalisée !

COPROGREEN – Le compost accessible à tous, sans contrainte.

Name: Wizard srls
Description:
Wizard Srls è una start-up innovativa che affronta una delle sfide più urgenti nelle città italiane: la gestione inefficiente dei rifiuti urbani e il problema dei cassonetti strabordanti. Fondata nel 2018, Wizard ha sviluppato una tecnologia brevettata che migliora significativamente la compattazione dei rifiuti, aumentando la capacità di carico dei cassonetti e ottimizzando i costi operativi e ambientali.

La nostra soluzione di compattamento è ideale per aree urbane con elevati volumi di conferimento e per zone in cui i punti di raccolta sono distanti, riducendo fino al 50% la frequenza degli svuotamenti e il numero di spostamenti degli operatori ecologici. Grazie a un sistema di monitoraggio telematico, i cassonetti possono essere svuotati solo quando necessario, riducendo i costi e le emissioni di CO2.

Proteggendo la nostra innovazione con brevetti internazionali, abbiamo consolidato il nostro impegno verso la sostenibilità e la gestione ottimizzata dei rifiuti urbani. Oggi, offriamo soluzioni scalabili per le amministrazioni pubbliche, le aziende municipali e il settore della pianificazione urbana, con l’obiettivo di migliorare l’efficienza, ridurre l’impatto ambientale e contribuire al decoro urbano.

Wizard Srls non è solo un’azienda tecnologica, ma un partner strategico che promuove un cambiamento positivo nella gestione dei rifiuti. La nostra missione è trasformare ogni città in una comunità più pulita e sostenibile, utilizzando soluzioni intelligenti che rispondono alle esigenze moderne.

Siamo entusiasti di espandere il nostro impatto, portando innovazione a livello nazionale e internazionale, con un forte focus sull’efficienza operativa, la sostenibilità e il miglioramento delle città in cui viviamo.

Zoekt u dus een partner voor dergelijke afvalstromen? Laat het ons weten en wij bekijken of we u de totaaloplossing kunnen bieden die u zoekt.

Blue Recycling is a recycling, sourcing and sorting company which offers tailormade solutions to those companies in need of solutions for their waste streams or challenges. Name: JUNK GODS
Description:
Do you feel guilty when you think about sentencing your junk to life in a landfill? We do as well.  That’s why we strongly believe in giving the items collected by our customers a second life.  Unlike other junk removal company that claim they donate, we in fact have the space to bring back everything salvageable to get sorted at our 2000 sq. foot warehouse and thereafter are given back for FREE to the community. Yes, you heard us right – for FREE.   We contemplated about given them to different thrift stores and so call organizations, but they are more than happy in taking the items for free and selling them back to the consumers. That’s not what we call, helping our community.  So, it was decided to pave our own road map by offering furniture, books, clothing, sports equipment, and household goods for FREE.

It's time to wake-up and see that our children and our children's children will be the one's suffering from our non-eco ways. 
"We have to stand up and take our responsibilities seriously cause our children will be living in garbage and toxic pollution.  It's no joke. Did you know that the average life expectancy of a landfill is roughly 30 years. Landfills must be monitored for 30 years after closure." Thirty years goes by fast. Would you like to be living next to a landfill one day? I don't believe you would. So let's pull together and make a difference by recycling as much as possible.

Na Slovensku sme výhradným dodávateľom systému od fínskeho výrobcu MOLOK, ktorý je zakladateľom myšlienky zberu odpadov pod zemou. MOLOK je celosvetovo najväčší výrobca. Polopodzemné kontajnery vyrába už od r. 1991 a ročne dodáva do celého sveta viac ako 15.000 ks kontajnerov. Toto takmer 30 ročné know-how sa prejavuje najmä v kvalite a trvácnosti produktov, rovnako tak aj v neustálom vývoji a inováciách, ktoré pomáhajú splniť požiadavky aj tých najnáročnejších partnerov a prispôsobiť zberné miesta rôznym typom urbanistickej zástavby.

Našimi partnermi sú najmä mestá a obce, developeri a zberové spoločnosti. V súčasnosti rozbiehame spoluprácu aj s priemyselnou sférou, ktorá si takisto našla benefity v nami ponúkaných riešeniach.

Name: MobileDumps Spokane/CDA

Our dumpster delivery process is simple:

You schedule a Mobiledump
We deliver the trailer to you on schedule
We place it where you want it
You fill it up
We return, on time, to take it away

We have turned dumpster delivery into an on-demand service like DoorDash or Uber. Mobiledumps is more convenient than traditional dumpster rental services because of advantages such as:

Flat fees for all services
No extra or hidden charges
No property damage
Online booking and payment

The Mobiledumps Trailer
When you order from Mobiledumps, we deliver a trailer that’s 14 feet long, 7 feet wide and 4 feet deep. It can hold eight pickup trucks’ worth of waste. But size is not its only advantage.

Mobiledumps can place the trailer exactly where you want it, unlike the large rolloffs that traditional dumpster rental services offer. Because the trailers have wheels, they won’t damage your driveway or yard, either. No permits are required, either.

The trailers have low, “swing-open” back doors that make loading easy. And they have 4-foot walls, too, allowing you to pack in plenty of material.

Name: WEEE Estonia- Eesti Elektroonikaromu
Description:
As one of the leading Producer Responsibility Organizations (PROs) in Estonia, Eesti Elektroonikaromu is steadfastly dedicated to the efficient management and recycling of all forms of electronic waste (e-waste) and batteries.

E-Waste Collection in Estonia: The Role of Eesti Elektroonikaromu
Eesti Elektroonikaromu plays a pivotal role in organizing the collection of e-waste in Estonia. Here’s how it works.

Network of Collection Points
Eesti Elektroonikaromu has established an extensive network of collection points across Estonia where individuals and businesses can drop off their e-waste for free. This includes smaller collection bins for portable batteries and larger collection containers for all types of e-waste.

Take-Back System
Eesti Elektroonikaromu works with retailers to implement a take-back system where customers can return old or end-of-life electrical and electronic equipment when they purchase new items, regardless of whether the old item is of the same type as the new one.

Collection from Businesses
For larger businesses, institutions, or municipalities with significant amounts of e-waste, Eesti Elektroonikaromu offers a direct collection service. They arrange for the pickup and transportation of e-waste directly from these premises.

Special Collection Events
In addition to these regular services, Eesti Elektroonikaromu also organizes special collection events in different locations to encourage local communities to dispose of their e-waste responsibly.

In conclusion, Eesti Elektroonikaromu, as a leading PRO in Estonia, not only takes care of the efficient management and recycling of e-waste and batteries, but also helps to educate the public about the importance of proper e-waste disposal, contributing to a more sustainable Estonia.

Read more:
https://elektroonikaromu.ee/en/join-a-producer-responsibility-organisation-in-estonia/

Name: E-Pro Recyclers
Description:
JSA E-waste Solutions & Services ( A Unit of JSA WEB SOLUTIONS ) is a pioneer in asset management and electronics recycling, with its top-of-the-line services to efficiently manage, dispose, and recycle discarded electronic items. Our portfolio of services includes comprehensive and eco-friendly recycling services as well as end-to-end E-Waste refurbishment, remanufacturing, reuse, and recycling (4R Principle).
    JSA E-waste has a plant in Jigani Industrial area, Bangalore, located in Karnataka, With an installed capacity of over 1,240 metric tons with a recycling capacity of 3,000 MT. 
                        JSA E-waste has a state-of-the-art facility for extracting reusable resources from electronic waste under the supervision of its highly skilled staff who pay maximum attention to ensure that all the recycling tasks are carried out in an eco-friendly manner.
           Our E-waste business is never regular or consistent in all months because it is on an E-waste LOT to LOT basis or depends upon the size of the LOT. One of the Major reasons for the irregularity of revenue’s month on a monthly basis is because of the accumulation of e-waste till year-end basis or financial year-end basis disposal. 
                      Many corporate customers are also following the parent overseas company FY calendar at times for e-waste compliance and disposal which is at times Jan-to-Dec in the same year and FY year end is Oct-Nov-Dec (FY Q3). If some delays in processing the approvals for e-waste disposal the Indian offshore branch of MNCs or Indian Origin Corporates accumulate e-waste for disposal by the Indian FY year end which is Jan-Feb-March (FY Q4) for high input of stocks, Both in purchases and sales in any given financial year. At times we also have to carry forward of high volume of e-waste input stocks due to the time taken to get e-waste stocks reprocessed, refurbished, and recycled for sale.

Name: Hintons Skip Hire
Description:
Getting skip hire in Croydon, Sutton and across London has never been easier. At Hinton’s Waste, we have over a decade of experience in delivering efficient, affordable skip hire services.

We know that getting rid of waste can be a nuisance, which is why our local Croydon skip hire service is designed around you. You choose the skip size that is right for you and we’ll deliver it promptly outside your property or to your site – we can even help if you need a skip hire permit to place the skip in the road. Getting cheap skip hire in Croydon means you save multiple trips to the local authority sites and you can keep your project on schedule.

When you’ve filled your skip, give us a call and we’ll collect it again.

We provide local skip hire across Croydon, Sutton, London and the surrounding areas. Our skip hire services are available for everyone in these areas, no matter the size or scale of the project. We offer cheap skip hire for all different sizes of skip — everything from a 6-yard mini skip to our 16-yard skip is available to hire with same-day delivery.

Our skip hire prices are second to none. We offer competitive prices on all skip hire services, including our wait-and-load services. We also offer flexible hire periods, so you can use your skip for as much time as you need. When you’re done, we’ll remove the skip on your behalf and recycle as much as your waste as possible.

Our skips are fully tested, and we even offer asbestos skips if you need to remove asbestos. Thanks to our quick turnarounds, you can have a skip on your doorstep on the same day that you order.

As a local skip hire company, we want to help you recycle as much of your waste as possible, which is why we have our own facilities. Our dedicated recycling facility ensures that your waste is diverted from landfill and used to create new products. It’s our way of helping to protect the environment. We meet the Environment Agency standards and can recycle at least 90% of the waste we collect.

Description:

Luke Soto holds a Master of Business Administration from Marshall University Lewis College of Business. Chris Mottillo is a University of Pennsylvania graduate with a background in legal studies in the Wharton School of Business. He also holds a Master of Business Administration from Marshall University Lewis College of Business. 

Eighty6Eighty Waste Management offers door-to-dump valet trash service, eliminating the hassle of over-stuffed on-site dumpsters by offering scheduled waste removal—ensuring all waste is discreetly transported off-site.

Most “valet” or “concierge” waste management services merely move waste from bins at individual residences to a consolidated larger waste bin, still on the premises of the housing complex, leading to unsightly pile ups and overfilled dumpsters. Well-kept, properly managed neighborhoods are more attractive to residents and visitors alike, enhancing overall quality of life, encouraging lease renewals, and capturing interest from those passing by; such can only be achieved through off-site waste removal.

- Valet removal of everyday trash buildup from your doorstep

- Removal and disposal of any beds, bed frames, sofas, couches, loveseats, televisions, tables, chairs, or other items that may be considered appliances or furniture

Name: EcoAstra
Description:
Converting landfill waste into Green Hydrogen Gas, Green fuel, and Construction products with a negative carbon footprint.

As our Ecoastra tagline "Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam" This Sanskrit phrase, meaning "the world is one family," underscores the interconnectedness of all living beings and the environment. It encourages responsible living that considers the impact on the whole Earth.

The concept of "Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam" resonates with the global challenges of climate change and resource depletion, urging collective action for a sustainable future.

Eco Astra came up with World Revolutionary Technology, where landfill waste will be upcycled into Hydrogen Gas, where H2 is used as an energy source for heat and power production, the only emissions are water, vapor, and heat.
 
 Eco Astra tackles environmental challenges through a two-pronged approach:
1. Waste Reduction and Diversion:
We divert landfill waste, including plastics and other non-biodegradable materials, from landfills. This reduces:
Landfill overflow and associated problems: Less waste in landfills means less land pollution and reduced methane emissions, a potent greenhouse gas.
Need for virgin materials: Utilizing waste as a resource reduces reliance on extracting and processing new materials, which often have significant environmental impacts.
2. Production of Sustainable Products:
Eco Astra's process transforms waste into:
Green hydrogen gas: This clean-burning fuel produced through a sustainable method replaces fossil fuel-based hydrogen, lowering greenhouse gas emissions.
Construction materials with a negative carbon footprint: These materials, like their "WoW Roof tiles," capture and store more carbon dioxide than emitted during their production and use, actively contributing to removing carbon from the atmosphere.

Name: E. Bigler Transporte AG
Description:
Die E. Bigler Transporte AG entsorgt den Abfall und die Wertstoffe von über 40‘000 Einwohnern in sieben verschiedenen Gemeinden. Wir feiern im 2025 das 100-Jahre Firmenjubiläum. Unsere acht Kehrichtfahrzeuge und der Mitarbeiterpool ermöglichen, unsere Dienstleistungen tagtäglich reibungslos zu erbringen und bei technischen oder menschlichen Ausfällen rasch zu reagieren. Wir sind stolz darauf, mehrere Mitarbeiter:innen in unseren Reihen zu haben, die seit über 20, ja sogar 30 und 35 Jahren für unseren Kehrichtbetrieb unterwegs sind.

Unser 1925 gegründete Familienunternehmen gehört heute zu den innovativsten Betrieben der Kehrichtabfuhr-Branche. Auch in der 4. Generation setzt man auf die altbewährten Werte wie Zuverlässigkeit, Regionalität, Kundennähe und Flexibilität. Wir haben drei vollelektrische Kehrichtlastwagen im Einsatz und nehmen damit eine Vorreiterrolle in der ökologischen, kommunalen Abfuhr ein. Für die Abfallsammlung in kleineren Gemeinden haben wir einen kleinen 2-Achs-Kehrichtlastwagen im Einsatz.

At Salt Lake Dumpster, we’ve proudly served the Salt Lake metropolitan area for over 17 years, delivering reliable and professional hauling and logistics solutions to individuals and businesses alike. What started as a small, locally focused operation has grown into a trusted partner for cleanouts, renovations, and large-scale projects, all while maintaining our commitment to exceptional customer service and reliability.

We believe our work goes beyond simply hauling waste or transporting items. It’s about providing peace of mind and making our clients’ projects easier, whether they’re cleaning out a home, tackling a construction job, or managing business logistics. Our team approaches every project with professionalism and care, ensuring every client feels valued and supported from start to finish.

Customer care is at the heart of everything we do. We pride ourselves on being responsive, transparent, and budget-conscious, offering tailored solutions that fit our clients’ needs without sacrificing quality. From our clear communication to our willingness to work within your budget, we strive to provide a service that’s not only dependable but also personal and trustworthy.

As a licensed and professional company, Salt Lake Dumpster adheres to the highest industry standards, ensuring compliance, safety, and reliability in every aspect of our operations. With a fleet of well-maintained dumpsters and a 26-foot box truck, we’re equipped to handle a wide range of projects, from small cleanouts to large commercial endeavors.

At Salt Lake Dumpster, we’re proud of the relationships we’ve built with our clients and the reputation we’ve earned for being a company you can count on. With a focus on quality, honesty, and innovation, we look forward to continuing to serve our community for many years to come.

Our experienced, trained crew coupled with our trucks and trailers make us capable of lifting and moving nearly anything. No project too big, no project too small. When you have something you need hauled away Junk Geeks Junk Removal is the company you need to call!

Name: Tabula | Recycling
Description:
Tabula operates from the belief that by 2040, we will have found ways to recycle most if not all items that have previously found their way to landfills. At Tabula, we think waste is dumb, and we look forward to helping make it seamless for individuals to put their trash to use and create impact in their communities for just $15 / month. 

Simply put, Tabula is a bi-weekly collection service for plastic film, light bulbs, batteries, and other hard to recycle items. Additional items may include old electronics, clothes, shoes, styrofoam, and garden pots. We partner with local operators who are capable of recycling and up-cycling materials that would otherwise end up in landfills. We want to do things better, and we believe services like our own will play a pivotal part in helping build more efficient resource management systems. 

Tabula's name comes from a latin phrase, Tabula Rasa, meaning blank slate. As we continually progress as a species and improve the design of our homes, cities, and waste management systems, we will celebrate cleaner, greener environments in rural and urban areas alike. Tabula is one step towards this vision. Thanks for being a part of this important work. 

For questions, comments or otherwise: Taylor@tabulacycle.com

Name: Target Tyn LLC
Description:
I’m a student entrepreneur passionate about creating sustainable, innovative solutions that make a real-world impact. My flagship venture, Target Tyn, addresses one of the world’s most overlooked but widespread environmental problems: nicotine waste. Cigarette butts and nicotine pouches are the most littered items globally, leaching toxins into soil and water, harming wildlife, and costing cities millions in cleanup each year.

Target Tyn is a patented public disposal system designed to be functional, durable, and community-driven. Its bold bullseye design gamifies waste disposal, encouraging responsible behavior in a way that’s engaging and memorable. Built with stainless steel, aluminum, and cast iron, the unit is weatherproof and designed for long-term use. A hidden squeegee system makes maintenance simple, cutting down on labor while promoting sustainability. Styled like a vintage park lamp post, it fits seamlessly into campuses, parks, and public spaces while standing out as a positive landmark.

Since its creation, Target Tyn has received recognition and funding:

2nd Place & People’s Choice Award at the Culver Business Model Competition

$9,500+ in grants and awards to advance prototyping and development

Invitations to The Pitch and Idea to Isle, intercollegiate startup competitions

The mission of Target Tyn is simple but powerful: create cleaner campuses, greener parks, and healthier cities by tackling an environmental crisis often ignored.

Beyond Target Tyn, I also founded Scarlet & Cream Shaves, a packaged shaved ice cream sheet product inspired by Asian snow ice but adapted for U.S. markets. Tied to UW–Madison and Wisconsin pride, it combines international dessert innovation with local branding, market research, and design.

Across all my ventures, I bring a consistent philosophy: align entrepreneurship with sustainability, creativity, and community impact. My goal is to build businesses that do well by doing good—turning small, everyday actions into m

Name: Green Loop Recycling
Description:

We specialize in converting agricultural, industrial, and household waste into high-quality Refuse-Derived Fuel (RDF) and biomass, helping industries reduce their dependence on traditional fossil fuels while supporting a cleaner environment.

By applying advanced sorting, shredding, and processing technologies, we ensure that every ton of waste is utilized efficiently — minimizing landfill use and maximizing energy recovery. Our approach not only supports the circular economy but also empowers businesses to meet their environmental and energy goals.

Through innovation, responsibility, and green technology, Green Loop Recycling is proud to close the loop — turning waste into a powerful source of renewable energy for a sustainable future.

Green Loop Recycling — Turning Waste into Energy, and Energy into Progress.

Breezeway Disposal Junk Removal is a dedicated and experienced team of professionals committed to providing efficient, eco-friendly, and responsible junk removal solutions. With years of expertise in the industry, we have established ourselves as a trusted partner for individuals, businesses, and construction projects in need of clutter-free spaces and responsible waste management.

What Do We Do?

At Breezeway Disposal, we understand that junk comes in all shapes and sizes. Whether you're dealing with old furniture, broken appliances, construction debris, yard waste, or any other unwanted items, we've got you covered. Our comprehensive services include:

Residential Junk Removal: We help homeowners regain control of their living spaces by efficiently removing unwanted items, from outdated furniture and electronics to cluttered basements and garages.

Commercial Junk Removal: Businesses benefit from our expertise in clearing out offices, retail spaces, and warehouses, creating a clean and organized environment that enhances employee productivity and customer satisfaction.

Construction Debris Removal: Construction sites can quickly accumulate debris and waste. We ensure that your construction project runs smoothly by promptly and safely removing materials like concrete, wood, drywall, and more.

Pada tahap bergerak usaha perusahaan kami, fokus kami adalah pada pengepulan UCO (Used Cooking Oil) di tingkat domestik dari rumah ke rumah, sekarang kami sudah memiliki mitra dari berbagai sektor penghasil limbah minyak goreng bekas.

Melihat dan menanggapi potensi atas kebutuhan energy hijau global, PT. Bioenergi Indo Nusantara tentunya sesuai dengan yang dicanangkan oleh pemerintah Republik Indonesia yakni menggunakan konsep 3R yaitu: Reduce (mengurangi jumlah limbah), Reuse (memanfaatkan kembali limbah), dan Recycle (mengubah bentuk limbah menjadi bentuk lain yang masih bisa dimanfaatkan).

Our brand new five-acre operations and maintenance facility is located at 16025 Hollister Street, Houston, Texas 77066.  With a state-of-the-art design and built to FEMA specifications it can withstand a category 4 hurricane and remain fully operational, indefinitely. Included is a 24,000 square foot hardened building containing a 500KW generator and 40,000 gallons of diesel fuel, as well as a secure communications suite.

Champions has positioned itself as a fully capable, primary emergency responder in the event of a national disaster or emergency. We own specialty equipment, such as grappling trucks, mobile generators, plasma cutters, and winches to assist in every type of catastrophe. If the PUD/MUD becomes a Champions customer, it will have priority to receive our emergency services.

We operate the newest, most efficient and safety-enabled, American-made trucks: (2022-2023) Mack “TerraPro” Refuse Trucks designed for maximum and uninhibited visibility with a flat cab/windshield and no forward hood. For faster service, our unique collection system utilizes brand new Ford F250 Super Duty scout trucks for cul-de-sac trash and recycling collection. These scout trucks are easily maneuverable and cause less congestion in limited turn areas.

Name: SOCRRA and Southeastern Oakland County Water Authority (SOCWA)
Description:
SOCWA and SOCRRA are municipal corporations governed by separate Boards of Trustees. The two organizations share an administrative staff who perform management, accounting and finance, educational and clerical duties. The combined annual budgets for the two organizations is $50 million.

SOCWA’s main function is the transportation and distribution of Detroit water to the 245,000 residents of its 13 member communities through a transmission system that includes a series of pumping stations and reservoirs. 

SOCRRA provides a complete range of solid waste services to the 275,000 residents of its 12 member communities.  It is responsible for the curbside collection of recycling, trash and yard waste from the residents of its member communities and the processing of the collected materials. SOCRRA also operates several facilities – a Material Recovery Facility (MRF) which processes recyclables into saleable commodities, a Transfer Station for municipal solid waste disposal, a Compost Site which converts yard waste collected curbside into garden compost and a Recycling Drop-off Center.

Name: The Green Transformation
Description:
The objective of the R2R platform is to identify and relate, according to the principles of Industrial Symbiosis, companies and operators present in the area in a simple and free way to transform a problem/cost into a resource/profit.

The R2R platform allows you to freely view all the ads on the R2R platform.

Registered users can insert sale or purchase announcements for free and proceed to send a purchase or sale proposal for the products listed in the announcements.

The R2R platform was created with the support provided by the POR Campania FESR 2014-2020.

The R2R platform also provides users with the possibility, for some types of biogenic waste, of verifying which valorisation processes are more sustainable and which are the yields of the main product obtained from the identified processes.

Name: ecohub. - återvinning och rapportering (ESRS, Co2, CSRD) på ett och samma ställe
Description:
Ecohub är marknadens enda kompletta lösning för verksamheter som vill ta ett helhetsgrepp kring återbruk, avfallshantering och hållbarhetsrapportering. Plattformen förenklar och effektiviserar hela processen – från insamling och invägning av avfall, till fakturering, analys och rapportering av spårbar klimatdata.

Med Ecohub Operations skapas en effektiv hantering av avfallsfraktioner, där insamling, invägning och registrering sker digitalt på hyresgästnivå, vilket minskar risken för fel, förenklar administrationen och ger hyresgästerna värdefulla insikter om sin avfallshantering.

Ecohub Invoicing automatiserar och förenklar faktureringen mot hyresgäster och butiker baserat på deras faktiska konsumtion och återvinningsvolymer. Detta säkerställer en rättvis och transparent faktureringsmodell som både sparar tid och ökar kundnöjdheten.

Färdiga klimatrapporter via Ecohub Reporting, där användare enkelt kan ta fram exakta och spårbara hållbarhetsrapporter som uppfyller dagens krav på transparens och hållbarhet, såsom CSRD, GHG Scope 3 och CO₂-rapporter. Rapportportalen gör det möjligt att tydligt och enkelt kommunicera verksamhetens klimatpåverkan till både interna och externa intressenter.

Med Ecohub Circular möjliggörs enkel och effektiv handel med begagnade möbler, byggmaterial och andra varor, vilket främjar cirkulär ekonomi och minskar verksamhetens klimatavtryck.

Ecohub Predict tar analysen till nästa nivå, genom avancerad data mining och extrapolering av data för att ge insikter om framtida återvinnings- och hållbarhetsresultat. Här finns även möjlighet till benchmarking mot andra verksamheter, vilket hjälper företag att identifiera förbättringsmöjligheter och optimera sin klimatstrategi.

Ecohub vänder sig till fastighetsägare som vill erbjuda sina hyresgäster en komplett och transparent lösning där de själva kan påverka sina avfallskostnader, samt återvinningsbolag som vill erbjuda sina kunder en framtidssäker lösning som möter alla aktuella lagkrav.

Name: Turd Toters LLC
Description:
Have you ever been on the receiving end of a phone call where your significant other is screaming obscenities because they just stepped in a steamy pile of dog poop barefoot? Have you ever been dressed to the nines ready to go to an event or on a date and smelled something while driving down the road, only to realize you’ve got poop on the bottom of your shoe? Have you ever been sitting on the couch watching the game, your toddler comes to sit beside you, and the smell of poop smacks you in the nose with the harsh reality that the smell isn’t coming from their diaper, but they’ve rolled in doggy doo before coming inside?

I could go on and on with these scenarios and if you have ever owned or been around pets, particularly dogs, I’m sure you have your own traumatizing story. Whether you’re 2 or 102, if you ever step on a brown land mine it gets etched into your brain. Stepping in gum is bad, but a hot smelly pile will put a damper on your day for sure!

To sum it up… Crap Happens!
Animals must poop and unless they’re trained to go in the toilet or you have a house cat using a litter box, chances are you’ll have a Tootsie roll surprise waiting for you in the yard.

This is where we come in… Turd Toters, LLC is here to pick up what your fur babies are putting down. We aim to limit the possibility of messing up those brand-new kicks or ruining a barefoot day in the backyard. Our focus is to satisfy your pet waste management needs and prevent diseases from spreading. We offer an array of packages for both residential and commercial properties ranging from bi-weekly, 1x, 2x, 3x a month to one-time clean ups.

Homeowners, HOA managers, Property managers, Realtors, Hotels, Motels, government agencies or commercial businesses that have the need for our services, we’ve got you covered like flies on… well you get it! Here at Turd Toters, LLC Our days are crappy so yours don’t have to be!

Name: PlastiTrack
Description:
PlastiTrack is an early-stage clean and sustainability tech platform designed to address the growing challenge of plastic waste mismanagement in communities. The platform provides individuals and households with an easy way to schedule plastic pickups directly from their homes or neighborhoods, ensuring plastics are properly collected and directed into recycling systems. By connecting users with local plastic collectors through a seamless digital interface, PlastiTrack bridges the gap between waste generation and responsible disposal. With real-time status tracking that moves from Pending to In Transit to Collected, users gain transparency and trust in the process, while also building consistent recycling habits.
Beyond logistics, PlastiTrack integrates AI-powered plastic identification technology, which ensures that the right materials are being collected, reducing inefficiencies and improving the quality of recyclables. The platform not only reduces litter, clogged drainage, and pollution but also contributes to building sustainable cities and communities by promoting circular economy practices. In doing so, PlastiTrack creates a positive environmental and social impact—empowering individuals to take part in recycling, enabling collectors to access more structured opportunities, and driving progress toward a cleaner and greener future.

Name: Bin Buddies Ltd
Description:
Bin Buddies is a dedicated waste management service focused on the unique needs of holiday homeowners and their management companies that often miss out on waste collection days in Northumberland. 

Our services ensure that your waste management is handled efficiently, providing peace of mind and maintaining a clean environment onsite at the properties. 

1. Bin Pulls: Out and In:

We handle the timely placement and return of your bins, ensuring they are always out on the correct evening for collection and promptly brought back once emptied. This service is crucial for holiday homeowners who are not always present and receive bad reviews when guests arrive to find their bins are already full. These pulls will also negate the need for emergency bin emptying and waste collection. 

2. Waste Removal, Disposal and Recycling: 

When your waste exceeds the bin capacity, we collect and safely dispose of any overspill. This service prevents hazardous waste build-up and maintains a clean, tidy environment for your properties and guests.

3. Collection and Recycling with a Buddies Box:

We provide our storage boxes to subscribed properties, with which we collect all glass on a specific day of the week, depending on the location. Our glass collection services ensure that all recyclable bottles & jars etc are properly sorted and disposed of through our recycling points. We keep glass separate from other recycling as it will always get refused by the council bin collections.

4. Bin Cleans: 

Our bin cleaning service includes a thorough pressure jet wash and subsequent scent elimination to remove odour or residue.

Name: Yard Dog Systems
Description:
Yard Dog is an internet-delivered program with the main goal of giving Waste Management Haulers the preventative measures needed to lessen the municipal fines accumulated by drivers missing service addresses. 

Unlike most vehicle tracking systems, which take years of human maintenance and route monitoring, our program is a one-of-a-kind spatial solution that uses existing virtual geographic projections to pinpoint exactly where a truck is and compare it to where it should be. The result? The only platform that can give you real-time notification when a stop is missed! 

Additionally, we use this format to equip customer service representatives with the most accurate record of service dates for customer addresses, enabling them to promptly and accurately answer questions about trash pickup days, ensuring smooth and satisfactory interactions with our valued customers.

Local city officials can utilize our services to ensure contractual pick up obligations are being fulfilled by their local waste company. Our integrated applet, featured on city websites, provides residents with convenient access to their trash collection dates, ensuring a seamless and user-friendly experience for all members of the community.

*Reinforce Driver Accountability
*Uphold Operational Awareness
*Avoid Costly Penalties
*Optimize Dispatch and Workflow
*Ensure Service Reliability

Partner with Yard Dog Systems today!

Name: EcoWing
Description:
Tons of solid wastes are accumulating on coastlines around the world including Hong Kong, spoiling the beautiful coasts and the marine ecosystems. 

However current collection are mostly done by hand-picking, a labor-intensive, inefficient and difficult task, especially across complex and hard-to-reach coastal terrain including pebble beach, wetland and rocky shore, indicating unique challenges of this pressing issue locally and worldwide.

Our startup EcoWing uses AI-powered analytics and autonomous drone technology to transform coastal waste management. With real-time detection of waste using machine learning, our system consists of agile small drones with robotic claw to pick up the waste, and a coordinated larger drone that carries the collected and categorized waste, entirely changed by solar energy. Such mobile system achieves full automation of the collection process, reaching areas where traditional cleanup is difficult or dangerous. 

Beyond cleanup, our system generates valuable environmental data through continuous aerial mapping and analysis. This data helps governments, NGOs, and researchers understand pollution patterns, identify hotspots, and design targeted conservation strategies.

By combining automation with data-driven insights, we reduce operational costs, improve efficiency, and protect fragile marine ecosystems. Our mission is to create cleaner coastlines and set a new global standard for smart, scalable, and sustainable coastal management. We aim to collaborate with the government and its cleaning contractors, NGOs, potential recycling companies and businesses with ESG responsibilities to together contribute towards a greener world.

Name: 24Collector's
Description:
24Collectors is an ESG organization dedicated to transforming waste into valuable resources. Our mission is to address one of the world's most pervasive litter issues: cigarette butts, which have been detrimentally impacting our environment for decades. At 24Collectors, we have strategically positioned ourselves to tackle this problem head-on by implementing innovative collection and recycling methods. By doing so, we aim to not only mitigate the environmental harm caused by cigarette butt litter but also to repurpose this waste into valuable materials.

The end products resulting from our recycling efforts have diverse applications, but one notable endeavor we are currently undertaking is the production of environmentally friendly car seats. By utilizing recycled materials derived from cigarette butts, we contribute to the creation of sustainable automotive components that align with the principles of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) standards.

At 24Collectors, we believe in the power of collaboration and innovation to drive positive change. Through our concerted efforts, we aspire to foster a cleaner, greener future while simultaneously promoting sustainable business practices. Join us in our mission to turn waste into opportunity and make a meaningful difference in our global community.

Description:
ScrapWalaOnDoor.com is an innovative online platform that transforms how waste management is approached in urban and rural areas. By connecting households and businesses with our network of “RagmanHeroes” or “kabadiwalas,” we provide a seamless door-to-door waste collection service. This not only makes waste disposal convenient but also promotes recycling and environmental conservation. We are seeking funding to expand our operations, enhance our technology, and increase our impact on sustainable waste management.

The Problem

Traditional waste management methods are often inefficient, inconvenient, and environmentally unsustainable. People have to manually segregate and dispose of their waste, which is then transported over long distances to landfills or recycling facilities, increasing carbon footprints. Many recyclables end up in landfills, wasting valuable resources that could be reused or repurposed.

Our Solution

ScrapWalaOnDoor.com offers a solution to this problem by providing an on-demand waste collection service through our platform. Users can easily schedule a pickup for their recyclable waste, and our RagmanHeroes will come to their doorstep to collect it. The collected waste is then taken to recycling facilities, where it is sorted, processed, and transformed into new products. This service not only makes waste management more convenient but also significantly reduces the environmental impact.

Name: Sasa Sisal
Description:
Sasa Sisal is on a mission to transform East Africa’s abundant sisal waste in to sustainable solutions, including protien and fuel.

Each year, ~500k tonnes of sisal waste is left to decompose. This waste results in nearly 1m tonnes carbon emissions per year.

At the same time, 3 million people in Kenya and Tanzania face a food crisis. In Kenya, 70% of soybeans and 30% of maize is used for animal feed, intensifying the “food vs. feed” debate. Over the last 3 years, the price of animal feed in Kenya rose ~ 80%, increasing pressures on the food system. The fish sector for example, faces an annual supply deficit of ~ 365k tonnes.

Sasa Sisal aims to address both the environmental impact of sisal waste in and the region’s growing food supply challenges by transforming agricultural waste into Black Soldier Fly Larvae (BSFL) – an affordable, sustainable, high protein animal and fish feed.

Name: Scrapp-it.com
Description:
Scrapp (formerly EcoSmart) works like an on-demand, community-focused companion to your town’s public works system. At its core, it’s a simple idea: households should be able to control when their waste gets picked up, instead of being locked into infrequent or inconvenient municipal schedules. From that idea grew a service that sits at the intersection of sustainability, logistics, and local problem-solving.

Scrapp lets residents schedule flexible pickups for almost any category of waste—recycling, compost, bulky items, electronics, yard waste, and more. A user chooses the type of waste, the pickup time, and the location. An EcoDriver then collects the material and brings it directly to the correct processing site, starting with Manalapan’s pre-sorted public works yard. This helps keep streets cleaner, prevents overflow on high-volume weekends, and increases diversion rates by routing items to the proper facilities.

The model is intentionally lightweight and scalable. The first phase will focus on serving 50 recurring households in Manalapan, with expansion planned into nearby communities like Marlboro and Freehold. Drivers include both cofounders and local gig workers recruited from platforms like Uber and DoorDash.

Scrapp aims to become a model for community-centered, tech-enabled waste management—one small pickup at a time.
